jobDescriptionHtml:
Lini Bisnis: Bahan Medis Habis Pakai (BMHP)

1. Kualifikasi Pendidikan

  • Pendidikan minimal S1:

    • Teknik Industri

    • Statistika

    • Sistem Informasi

    • Informatika

    • Manajemen (konsentrasi operasional/logistik)

    • atau bidang lain yang relevan

  • Pendidikan S2 di bidang Data Analytics / Manajemen Operasi / Supply Chain menjadi nilai tambah.

2. Pengalaman Kerja

  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 2–3 tahun sebagai:

    • Data Analyst

    • Data Officer

    • Analis Operasional / Logistik

    • Pengolah Data Proyek

  • Berpengalaman mengolah data pada sektor:

    • Alat kesehatan

    • Bahan medis habis pakai

    • Rumah sakit, distributor, atau pengadaan pemerintah (nilai tambah)

3. Kompetensi Teknis Utama

  • Mampu melakukan pengolahan, analisis, dan visualisasi data dalam skala operasional dan bisnis.

  • Memahami alur bisnis BMHP: perencanaan, pengadaan, distribusi, dan penggunaan.

  • Menguasai:

    • Microsoft Excel (lanjutan): Pivot Table, Power Query, Lookup, Dashboard

    • Microsoft PowerPoint untuk penyajian laporan analitis

  • Mampu menyusun database operasional BMHP (stok, pemakaian, kedaluwarsa, penjualan).

4. Sistem & Tools (Nilai Tambah)

  • Pengalaman menggunakan:

    • ERP / sistem logistik (misalnya Odoo, SAP, atau SIMRS)

    • Business Intelligence Tools (Power BI, Tableau, Looker)

  • Dasar pemrograman SQL / Python / R untuk pengolahan data menjadi nilai tambah.

5. Kompetensi Analitis & Bisnis

  • Mampu melakukan:

    • Analisis tren penggunaan dan penjualan BMHP

    • Analisis efisiensi stok dan perputaran barang

    • Forecasting kebutuhan BMHP berbasis data historis

  • Mampu menyajikan data menjadi rekomendasi strategis bagi manajemen.

6. Kemampuan Administratif & Dokumentasi

  • Mampu menyusun:

    • Laporan periodik (harian, bulanan, tahunan)

    • Rekap data operasional dan bisnis

    • Data pendukung audit dan evaluasi proyek

  • Memahami prinsip akurasi, validasi, dan keamanan data.

7. Soft Skills

  • Teliti, sistematis, dan memiliki perhatian tinggi terhadap detail.

  • Mampu bekerja dengan data dalam jumlah besar dan tenggat waktu ketat.

  • Memiliki kemampuan komunikasi yang baik untuk menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada tim non-teknis.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim lintas fungsi.

8. Etika Kerja & Kepatuhan

  • Menjunjung tinggi kerahasiaan dan integritas data.

  • Memahami kepatuhan terhadap kebijakan internal perusahaan dan regulasi sektor kesehatan.

9. Persyaratan Umum

  • Sehat jasmani dan rohani.

  • Bersedia bekerja dengan sistem target dan deadline.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan sesuai kebutuhan lini bisnis/proyek.

description: The GIS Analyst is responsible for collecting, analyzing, and managing spatial data to support business operations, planning, and decision-making processes through Geographic Information Systems (GIS).Key Responsibilities:Collect, process, and analyze geospatial and spatial dataDevelop and maintain ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The GIS Analyst is responsible for collecting, analyzing, and managing spatial data to support business operations, planning, and decision-making processes through Geographic Information Systems (GIS).


Key Responsibilities:

  • Collect, process, and analyze geospatial and spatial data

  • Develop and maintain GIS maps, layers, and databases

  • Perform spatial analysis to support planning, operations, and reporting

  • Update and manage geospatial data from field surveys, satellite imagery, and other sources


Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Geography, Geomatics, GIS, Remote Sensing, or related field

  • Minimum 2–4 years of experience as a GIS Analyst or similar role

  • Proficient in GIS software (ArcGIS, QGIS, or equivalent)

  • Strong understanding of spatial analysis and geodatabase management

  • Familiarity with LiDAR will be an advantage
title: GIS Analyst

description: Eklipse.gg is an AI‑powered clipping and editing service tailored for streamers and content creators. It scans your Twitch, YouTube, Kick, or Facebook Gaming stream VODs to automatically detect and generate highlight clips—think clutch plays, reactions, and high-action moments—then repackages them i...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Eklipse.gg is an AI‑powered clipping and editing service tailored for streamers and content creators. It scans your Twitch, YouTube, Kick, or Facebook Gaming stream VODs to automatically detect and generate highlight clips—think clutch plays, reactions, and high-action moments—then repackages them into vertical videos ready for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.

Data Analyst 

Responsibilities:

  • Mine and analyze data from company databases to drive optimization and improvement of product development, marketing techniques, and business strategies.

  • Assess the effectiveness and accuracy of new data sources and data-gathering techniques

  • Develop custom data models and algorithms to apply to data sets.

  • Coordinate with different functional teams to implement models and monitor outcomes.

  • Develop processes and tools to monitor and analyze model performance and data accuracy.


Requirements:

  • Having 2-3 years of experience manipulating data sets and building statistical models.

  • Having experience using Python minimal 1 year.

  • Education background: Bachelor's degree, but preferable from a Master's degree in Statistics, Mathematics, or another quantitative field (Fresh Graduate Welcome). GPA must be 3.00+

  • Young and energetic person.

  • Strong problem-solving skills with an emphasis on product development.

  • Experience using statistical computer languages (R, Python, SLQ, etc.) to manipulate data and draw insights from large data sets.

  • Experience working with and creating data architectures.

  • Deep knowledge of handling big data.

  • Knowledge of various machine learning techniques (clustering, decision tree learning, artificial neural networks, etc.) and their real-world advantages/drawbacks.

  • Knowledge of advanced statistical techniques and concepts (regression, properties of distributions, statistical tests, proper usage, etc.) and experience with applications.

  • A drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques.

  • Adaptable to dynamic work environments.

  • Understanding gaming trends is a plus.


Note:

  • There is a test for every suitable candidate.

  • Only the candidates who pass the test will be invited to an interview session.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

  • Collect, process, and analyze data from multiple internal sources to support business and operational needs

  • Prepare structured reports, dashboards, and presentations using Microsoft Excel

  • Conduct data analysis and basic automation using Python

  • Identify trends, patterns, and key insights to support management decision-making

  • Support ad-hoc analytical requests and ongoing data-related projects

  • Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and proper documentation in all analytical outputs

  • Collaborate with internal stakeholders to understand data requirements and business objectives


Job Requirement:

  • Maximum 2 years of relevant work experience; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply

  • Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Information Technology, Business Analytics, or a related field

  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (advanced formulas, pivot tables, data analysis)

  • Working knowledge of Python for data analysis

  • Strong analytical mindset with attention to detail

  • Good communication skills and ability to present data insights clearly

title: Data Analyst

company/name: PT Bahari Eka Nusantara (Ben Line Agencies)
description: Responsibilities:·       Develop, publish, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, tailored to meet specific business objectives and decision-making needs.·       Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand strategic goals, operational processes, and KPIs, leveraging...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

·       Develop, publish, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, tailored to meet specific business objectives and decision-making needs.

·       Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand strategic goals, operational processes, and KPIs, leveraging strong business domain knowledge to translate those needs into effective technical solutions.

·       Work cross-functionally with product owners, operations, finance, and IT teams to gather requirements, define data needs, and deliver impactful analytical outputs.

·       Translate business requirements into scalable data models, SQL queries, and reporting logic, ensuring alignment between data outputs and business expectations.

·       Write, optimize, and maintain SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, validation, and analysis across multiple data sources.

·       Ensure high standards of data accuracy, completeness, and consistency, applying robust validation, reconciliation.

·       Enforce and contribute to data governance policies, including data cataloging, metadata management, access control, and documentation of business logic and data definitions.

·       Support migration efforts from legacy reports/dashboards to centralized BI platforms, ensuring minimal disruption and maintaining historical data continuity.

·       Automate manual reporting processes and streamline data workflows, using tools such as Power BI, SQL, Power Automate, or Python.

·       Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize the performance of reports and dashboards, ensuring they are reliable, timely, and responsive to user needs.

·       Educate and empower end users across departments to interpret dashboards, use self-service analytics tools, and apply data insights effectively in their roles.

·       Stay informed about industry trends, tools, and best practices to continuously improve analytics solutions and bring innovation to the organization’s data strategy.


Qualifications:

·       Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Analytics, Economics, or a related field.

·       Proven experience in data analysis, root cause investigation, and data quality validation, with a strong understanding of data lifecycle and integrity.

·       Proficient in SQL for data extraction, transformation, and analysis; experience with Python for data processing, automation, or scripting is highly desirable.

·       Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure data services, such as Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL Database, and Azure Synapse Analytics; familiarity with GCP or AWS platforms is a plus.

·       Strong expertise in Power BI for developing dashboards, data models, visualizations, and DAX calculations to support business decision-making.

·       Good understanding of data governance, data quality assurance best practices.

·       Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail, with a commitment to delivering clean, accurate, and actionable data.

·       Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex business requirements into clear technical specifications and analytical solutions.

·       Effective stakeholder management, capable of working with both technical and non-technical audiences to gather requirements, deliver insights, and drive data-driven decisions.

·       Experience working in cross-functional teams within Agile, Scrum, or other project-based environments, with an ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines.

jobDescriptionHtml:
⚡️ MARKET DATA ANALYST: DRIVE GROWTH. DEFINE STRATEGY.


Are you ready to be the engine behind our revenue growth? We're looking for a sharp, data-driven analyst to manage, dissect, and visualize sales data. This is a critical, high-impact role aimed at uncovering trends, spotting market opportunities, and directly influencing our sales and marketing strategy. If you thrive on transforming raw data into actionable business decisions, you belong here.


📊 YOUR MISSION: TURNING DATA INTO DOLLARS

As our Sales Data Analyst, your expertise will shape our direction and boost our performance:

  • Data Command: Collect, process, and analyze complex sales data from diverse internal and external sources.

  • Insight Reporting: Develop routine and ad-hoc reports on sales performance, customer trends, and the effectiveness of all marketing campaigns (both online and offline).

  • Strategic Impact: Deliver data-backed insights to fuel and refine our core Marketing and Digital Marketing strategies.

  • Visualization Pro: Develop intuitive, interactive dashboards (using Power BI, Tableau, Looker Studio, or equivalent tools) to simplify sales KPI monitoring for stakeholders.

  • Targeting Precision: Execute market segmentation and comprehensive customer behavior analysis to drive highly targeted marketing programs.

  • Digital ROI: Collaborate closely with the Digital Marketing team to accurately measure the Return on Investment (ROI) of all digital campaigns (online ads, social media, email marketing, etc.).

  • Recommendation Engine: Provide clear, data-driven recommendations to aggressively boost the effectiveness of our sales and marketing strategies.

  • Forecasting Support: Providing data-driven recommendations to improve the effectiveness of sales and marketing strategies.


✅ YOUR ANALYTICAL POWER STACK

We are looking for candidates who can hit the ground running and bring serious analytical firepower:

  • Education: Bachelor's degree (S1) in Statistics, Mathematics, Economics, Management, Marketing Analytics, or a related quantitative field.

  • Experience: 1–3 years in data analysis, sales analysis, or marketing analytics is preferred. (Relevant internship experience is a major plus for fresh graduates!)

  • Visualization Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and strong command of data analysis/visualization software like Power BI, Tableau, or Google Data Studio (or equivalent industry-standard tools).

  • Technical Edge (Bonus): Ability to process data using statistical tools (SQL, Python, or R proficiency is a significant advantage).

  • Core Skills: Exceptional analytical ability, highly detail-oriented, and proven ability to extract meaningful insights from large datasets.

  • Business Context (A Plus): A solid understanding of marketing concepts, digital marketing frameworks, and the sales funnel.

  • Communication: Excellent communication skills to effectively translate complex data and insights to non-technical stakeholders (Marketing and Management).

  • Team Player: Ability to work effectively and collaboratively across cross-functional teams.


Ready to stop guessing and start calculating? Apply now and power our next phase of growth! 📩


What We Offer:

  • Competitive base salary

  • Quarterly performance bonuses

  • 12 extra collective leave days (in addition to personal leave)

  • Clear career growth & development program

  • Comprehensive health coverage (inpatient & outpatient, no third party hassle)

  • Annual medical check-up

  • Pension fund, savings cooperative, and employee outings

  • Chance to become a permanent employee

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

·       Develop, publish, and maintain interactive dashboards and reports using Power BI, tailored to meet specific business objectives and decision-making needs.

·       Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand strategic goals, operational processes, and KPIs, leveraging strong business domain knowledge to translate those needs into effective technical solutions.

·       Work cross-functionally with product owners, operations, finance, and IT teams to gather requirements, define data needs, and deliver impactful analytical outputs.

·       Translate business requirements into scalable data models, SQL queries, and reporting logic, ensuring alignment between data outputs and business expectations.

·       Write, optimize, and maintain SQL queries for data extraction, transformation, validation, and analysis across multiple data sources.

·       Ensure high standards of data accuracy, completeness, and consistency, applying robust validation, reconciliation.

·       Enforce and contribute to data governance policies, including data cataloging, metadata management, access control, and documentation of business logic and data definitions.

·       Support migration efforts from legacy reports/dashboards to centralized BI platforms, ensuring minimal disruption and maintaining historical data continuity.

·       Automate manual reporting processes and streamline data workflows, using tools such as Power BI, SQL, Power Automate, or Python.

·       Monitor, troubleshoot, and optimize the performance of reports and dashboards, ensuring they are reliable, timely, and responsive to user needs.

·       Educate and empower end users across departments to interpret dashboards, use self-service analytics tools, and apply data insights effectively in their roles.

·       Stay informed about industry trends, tools, and best practices to continuously improve analytics solutions and bring innovation to the organization’s data strategy.


Qualifications:

·       Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Analytics, Economics, or a related field.

·       Proven experience in data analysis, root cause investigation, and data quality validation, with a strong understanding of data lifecycle and integrity.

·       Proficient in SQL for data extraction, transformation, and analysis; experience with Python for data processing, automation, or scripting is highly desirable.

·       Hands-on experience with Microsoft Azure data services, such as Azure Data Factory, Azure SQL Database, and Azure Synapse Analytics; familiarity with GCP or AWS platforms is a plus.

·       Strong expertise in Power BI for developing dashboards, data models, visualizations, and DAX calculations to support business decision-making.

·       Good understanding of data governance, data quality assurance best practices.

·       Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail, with a commitment to delivering clean, accurate, and actionable data.

·       Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex business requirements into clear technical specifications and analytical solutions.

·       Effective stakeholder management, capable of working with both technical and non-technical audiences to gather requirements, deliver insights, and drive data-driven decisions.

·       Experience working in cross-functional teams within Agile, Scrum, or other project-based environments, with an ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines.

description:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!
‎

Job Description
We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will l...
jobDescriptionHtml:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!

‎ 

‎ 

Job Description

We are seeking a Data Analyst who will serve as a key thinking partner for our business stakeholders and product management teams across of our business and product domains. In this role, you will leverage data to drive insights, support decision-making, and provide actionable recommendations that will shape the direction of our products and business strategies. Some of the key responsibilities that you will have are:

  • Database: design, test, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Data Engineering) to enable, extract, or enrich data/data pipeline.

  • Reporting: design, build, and disseminate dashboards or other self-served data products to enable stakeholders get quick business performance, conduct data exploration, or derive quick insights.

  • Analysis: design, perform, and disseminate descriptive or diagnostic analyses with valuable findings and actionable insights to better understand the business.

  • Experimentation: design, analyze, and disseminate experiments or causal-impact studies to test multiple hypotheses, variants, or initiatives and infer the best result(s) based on relevant success metrics.

  • Modeling: design, develop, and collaborate with relevant parties (e.g Product Engineering, Machine Learning Engineer, Data Scientist) to deploy supervised or unsupervised models as per business needs to optimize business performance.

‎ 

Requirements

Several openings are available across multiple domains and levels

  • Bachelor/Master's degree majoring in Statistics, Mathematics, Physics, Computers/Informatics, Engineering, Economics, or equivalent

  • Good communication, presentation, and storytelling skills to deliver data-inspired findings, also passionate in data, analysis, or insights with high curiosity character.

  • 2-5 years of full time data analyst experience (open for prior experience in scientist and engineerr).

  • 2-5 years of hands-on experience with SQL, spreadsheet, and R/Python.

  • 2=5 years of dashboarding experience with BI or dataviz tools (Tableau, Looker Studio, Domo etc.).

  • Prior experience in conducting statistical experimentation or A/B testing is a plus.

  • Prior experience in developing unsupervised/supervised models is a plus.

  • Prior experience in working on cloud platforms (GCP, AWS, Azure, etc.) is a plus.

‎ 

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!
title: Data Analyst

description: About the roleWe are seeking a talented Data Analyst to join our dynamic Production team at PT Panasonic Gobel Energy Indonesia (PECGI) in Cikarang, Bekasi Regency, West Java. As a fulltime employee, you will play a crucial role in driving data-driven decision making and optimising our production pr...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a talented Data Analyst to join our dynamic Production team at PT Panasonic Gobel Energy Indonesia (PECGI) in Cikarang, Bekasi Regency, West Java. As a fulltime employee, you will play a crucial role in driving data-driven decision making and optimising our production processes.

What you'll be doing

  • Collect, analyse and interpret data from various production systems to identify trends, patterns and opportunities for improvement

  • Develop and maintain reporting dashboards to provide real-time visibility into production performance

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement data-driven solutions that enhance efficiency and productivity

  • Assist in the design and development of database structures to support the organisation's data management needs

  • Provide data-driven recommendations to management to drive strategic decision making

  • Stay up-to-date with the latest data analysis tools and techniques to continuously improve processes

What we're looking for

  • D3 qualification in a relevant field such as Information Technology, Computer Science or Data Analytics

  • Proficient in data analysis tools and techniques, including SQL, Excel, and data visualisation software

  • Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills with the ability to interpret data and draw meaningful insights

  • Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey data-driven insights to stakeholders

  • Familiarity with production processes and an understanding of manufacturing operations

  • Attention to detail and a keen interest in continuous improvement


If you are ready to embark on an exciting data-driven journey with us, we encourage you to apply now.
title: D3 Data Analyst for Production Staff (CODE : PROD DA)

jobDescriptionHtml:
Requirements :

- Minimum 1 year of relevant work experience, preferably in retail or retail enabler industries.
- Proficient in at least one programming language for data processing, such as Python or R, and SQL scripting.
- Experience working with large-scale datasets for exploratory and advanced data analysis, ensuring data integrity and identifying optimization opportunities is a plus.
- Experience in business analytics, data mining, data modeling, and data visualization to support data-driven decision-making is an advantage.
- Strong communication skills, with the ability to manage tasks or projects and collaborate comfortably with multiple teams.
- Proficient in English, both written and verbal.
- Willing to explore and apply modeling techniques, including forecasting models, trend analysis, and scenario simulations to enhance data-driven insights.

Job Description : 

-  Combining business analytics, data mining and data visualizations to help organizations making more data-driven decisions
- Interprets data, patterns, trends and turns it into actionable insights as ways to improve business
- Provide routine and ad hoc reports, ensuring insights are not just descriptive but also predictive and prescriptive where applicable.
- Translate routine data inquiries into automated, efficient reporting solutions to support operations and streamline decision-making.
- Utilize modelling techniques to build forecasting models, trend analyses, and scenario simulations, enhancing the depth of data-driven insights.
- Work with large-scale datasets to conduct exploratory and advanced data analysis, ensuring data integrity and uncovering new opportunities for optimization.
title: Data Analyst

Berpusat di Surabaya dan Gresik, memiliki cabang di 9 kota Jawa dan Bali. Membutuhkan individu - individu bertalenta untuk bergabung dalam Holding kami yang ada di Gresik.Kua...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kami adalah perusahaan yang bergerak dibidang printing, packaging, publishing, ekspedisi, dan trading dibawah Group Jawa Pos. Berpusat di Surabaya dan Gresik, memiliki cabang di 9 kota Jawa dan Bali. Membutuhkan individu - individu bertalenta untuk bergabung dalam Holding kami yang ada di Gresik.

Kualifikasi :

  1. Kandidat memiliki pendidikan minimal S1/S2 Jurusan Matematika/Statiska

  2. Pengalaman minimal 2 tahun di bidang MANUFAKTUR dan ANALYST OPERASIONAL

  3. Bersedia melaksanakan Perjalanan Dinas

  4. Mahir dalam tools analisa data seperti Google Data Studio, SQL, BigQuery, Power BI.

  5. Memiliki pengetahuan tentang statistik dan kemampuan untuk manganalisa data dengan Excel, SPSS, SAS.

Uraian Tugas :

  1. Mengumpulkan data dari berbagai sumber, termasuk database, spreadsheet, survei, dan sumber eksternal.

  2. Menggunakan metode statistik, algoritme, dan perangkat lunak untuk menganalisis kumpulan data, mengungkap pola, tren, dan korelasi, serta memperoleh wawasan yang dapat ditindaklanjuti.

  3. Menyajikan temuan secara efektif melalui bagan, grafik, dan dasbor.

  4. Mempersiapkan laporan yang merangkum temuan-temuan utama, tren, dan rekomendasi berdasarkan analisis data.

  5. Menafsirkan dan menjelaskan hasil analisis kepada pemangku kepentingan non-teknis, seperti General Manager & Direksi.

  6. Mengidentifikasi peluang untuk meningkatkan proses pengumpulan data, metode analisis, dan pengambilan keputusan berdasarkan data dalam organisasi.

description: Job Description :Data MiningIdentifying relevant data sources according to business needsCollecting and integrating data from various sourcesSearching for and completing data that is unavailable or incompleteData Exploration & AnalysisProcessing and preparing data so that it can be used for analysis...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description :
Data Mining

  • Identifying relevant data sources according to business needs

  • Collecting and integrating data from various sources

  • Searching for and completing data that is unavailable or incomplete

Data Exploration & Analysis

  • Processing and preparing data so that it can be used for analysis

  • Performing data analysis to answer business needs and questions

  • Generating insights by identifying patterns, trends, and relationships in the data

Data Visualization & Reporting

  • Developing informative and easy-to-understand data visualizations

  • Compiling reports and dashboards for management and project team needs

Training & Knowledge Sharing

  • Compiling or providing training materials and supporting documentation

  • Providing training to relevant functions or units on the use of dashboards

  • Supporting teams in understanding data structures and best practices for data visualization

Requirements :

Education: Minimum Bachelor's Degree

Work Experience: Minimum 2 years in a related field

Non-Technical Skills

  • Able to adapt quickly, proactive, and have a confident work attitude

  • Meticulous, data-oriented, and have a confident attitude

  • Have critical thinking skills to provide appropriate ideas and recommendations

  • Able to communicate and collaborate with various parties

  • Have good organizational skills, able to manage time, set priorities, and multitask

Technical Skills

  • Proficient in Power BI, including: Data modeling, DAX (Data Analysis Expressions), Dashboard creation, Report publishing and data refresh scheduling

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (advanced level), such as: Pivot Tables, Power Query, Advanced formulas (INDEX-MATCH/XLOOKUP, array formulas), Macros

  • Proficient in SQL (GoogleSQL / MySQL / PostgreSQL) for: Running complex data queries and performing data extraction and transformation

  • Experience in SAP data integration (optional), such as: Retrieving data via SAP GUI and connecting SAP data to Power BI or Excel
title: Data Analyst

description: Mengolah, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis.Menyusun laporan rutin dan dashboard performa (penjualan, operasional, marketing, dll).Mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan insight dari data yang tersedia.Berkolaborasi dengan tim terkait (Sales, Marketing...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Mengolah, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan bisnis.

Menyusun laporan rutin dan dashboard performa (penjualan, operasional, marketing, dll).

Mengidentifikasi tren, pola, dan insight dari data yang tersedia.

Berkolaborasi dengan tim terkait (Sales, Marketing, Finance, HR).

Menjaga akurasi, konsistensi, dan integritas data.

Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data kepada manajemen.

Mengelola semua data terintegrasi dengan sistem bank data perusahaan

title: Data Analyst

description: Job Description :Data MiningIdentifying relevant data sources according to business needsCollecting and integrating data from various sourcesSearching for and completing data that is unavailable or incompleteData Exploration & AnalysisProcessing and preparing data so that it can be used for analysis...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description :
Data Mining

  • Identifying relevant data sources according to business needs

  • Collecting and integrating data from various sources

  • Searching for and completing data that is unavailable or incomplete

Data Exploration & Analysis

  • Processing and preparing data so that it can be used for analysis

  • Performing data analysis to answer business needs and questions

  • Generating insights by identifying patterns, trends, and relationships in the data

Data Visualization & Reporting

  • Developing informative and easy-to-understand data visualizations

  • Compiling reports and dashboards for management and project team needs

Training & Knowledge Sharing

  • Compiling or providing training materials and supporting documentation

  • Providing training to relevant functions or units on the use of dashboards

  • Supporting teams in understanding data structures and best practices for data visualization

Requirements :

Education: Minimum Bachelor's Degree

Work Experience: Minimum 2 years in a related field

Non-Technical Skills

  • Able to adapt quickly, proactive, and have a confident work attitude

  • Meticulous, data-oriented, and have a confident attitude

  • Have critical thinking skills to provide appropriate ideas and recommendations

  • Able to communicate and collaborate with various parties

  • Have good organizational skills, able to manage time, set priorities, and multitask

Technical Skills

  • Proficient in Power BI, including: Data modeling, DAX (Data Analysis Expressions), Dashboard creation, Report publishing and data refresh scheduling

  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel (advanced level), such as: Pivot Tables, Power Query, Advanced formulas (INDEX-MATCH/XLOOKUP, array formulas), Macros

  • Proficient in SQL (GoogleSQL / MySQL / PostgreSQL) for: Running complex data queries and performing data extraction and transformation

  • Experience in SAP data integration (optional), such as: Retrieving data via SAP GUI and connecting SAP data to Power BI or Excel

title: Data Analyst

description: Responsibilities:Conduct industry and market research to identify trends, risks, and opportunitiesMonitor and analyze competitor strategies, performance, and positioningProvide data-driven insights to support strategic planning and decision-makingSupport strategy formulation through analysis, benchm...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  1. Conduct industry and market research to identify trends, risks, and opportunities

  2. Monitor and analyze competitor strategies, performance, and positioning

  3. Provide data-driven insights to support strategic planning and decision-making

  4. Support strategy formulation through analysis, benchmarking, and scenario evaluation

  5. Track and evaluate strategy execution and performance against defined goals and KPIs

  6. Assist in breaking down strategic objectives into actionable initiatives and milestones

  7. Support resource allocation decisions through analytical and cost–benefit analysis

  8. Prepare concise reports, dashboards, and presentations for management


Requirements:

  1. Strong knowledge of industry research and competitor analysis methodologies

  2. Proficient in data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, and data analytics platforms

  3. Excellent report writing, logical structuring, and analytical presentation skills

  4. 2–3 years of experience in strategy research, industry analysis, or related roles within the financial industry or high-growth companies

  5. Familiar with digital marketing and user growth logic

  6. Prior research experience in CFD, forex, or securities industries is a strong plus


📍 Location: Mega Kuningan, South Jakarta (Full On-Site)
title: Research & Strategy Analyst

description: Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda bertanggung jawab mengolah data operasional, penjualan, dan marketing menjadi insight yang dapat digunakan manajemen untuk meningkatkan omzet, efisiensi operasional, dan pengambilan keputusan bisnis.Tanggung Jawab UtamaMengolah dan menganalisis data penjualan harian, mingg...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda bertanggung jawab mengolah data operasional, penjualan, dan marketing menjadi insight yang dapat digunakan manajemen untuk meningkatkan omzet, efisiensi operasional, dan pengambilan keputusan bisnis.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Mengolah dan menganalisis data penjualan harian, mingguan, dan bulanan dari seluruh cabang.

  • Menganalisis performa produk (best seller, slow moving, margin per menu).

  • Membuat rencana penjualan dan mengeksekusi kegiatan penjualan tersebut

  • Membuat dashboard & report terkait: Omzet per cabang, Penjualan per channel (dine-in, take away, online, event, big order). Average transaction value (ATV). Food cost & margin

  • Menganalisis efektivitas promo, campaign marketing, dan event.

  • Mengidentifikasi pola penjualan (jam ramai, hari terbaik, lokasi potensial).

  • Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk: Penentuan harga, Strategi promo, Pembukaan cabang/booth baru, Perencanaan stok bahan baku.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim Marketing, Operasional, Finance, dan Business Development.

  • Menjaga akurasi dan konsistensi data dari berbagai sumber (POS, marketplace, laporan cabang).


Requirement

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 (Statistik, Matematika, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Ekonomi, atau sejenis).

  • ⁠Pengalaman minimal 1–2 tahun sebagai Data Analyst (diutamakan F&B, retail, atau franchise).

  • Mahir menggunakan Excel / Google Sheets (Pivot, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, formula).

  • ⁠Mampu mengolah data menggunakan SQL (nilai plus).

  • ⁠Pengalaman membuat dashboard menggunakan Looker Studio / Power BI / Tableau.

  • ⁠Memahami KPI bisnis F&B (omzet, margin, food cost, waste, ATV).

  • Pernah mengelola data banyMokaMajooooabang merupakan nilai utama.

  • ⁠Memahami sistem POS F&B.

  • ⁠Mampu melakukan basic forecasting penjualan.

  • ⁠Menguasai Python / R (nilai tambah).

  • ⁠Pengalaman analisis campaign marketing & promo.

  • ⁠Analitis, detail-oriented, dan logis.

  • ⁠Mampu menyederhanakan data kompleks menjadi insight yang mudah dipahami.

  • Komunikatif dan mampu menjelaskan data ke non-technical team.

  • ⁠Problem solver & business-oriented mindset.

  • ⁠Terbiasa bekerja dengan target & deadline.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Descriptions:

  • Develop, implement, and maintain leading-edge analytical systems, taking complex problems and building simple frameworks

  • Identify trends and opportunities for growth through the analysis of complex data sets

  • Evaluate organizational methods and provide source-to-target mapping and information model specification documents for data sets

  • Create best practice reports based on data mining, analysis, and visualization

  • Evaluate internal systems for efficiency, issues, and inaccuracies, and develop and maintain protocols for handling, processing, and cleaning data

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Information Systems, Statistics or related major from reputable university with min. 3.00 GPA

  • Min. 2 years working experience as Revenue Analyst (from Hospital or Hotel background will be an added advantage)

  • Strong research and analysis skills

  • Proficient in excel and understand basic SQL server query

description: Perusahaan kami sedang melakukan transformasi dari model bisnis tradisional menjadi model digital berbasis data dan AI. Kami mencari Data Analyst yang akan mengelola, membersihkan, dan mentransformasi data dari berbagai sumber menjadi data terstruktur untuk kebutuhan analitik dan pengembangan model ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Perusahaan kami sedang melakukan transformasi dari model bisnis tradisional menjadi model digital berbasis data dan AI. Kami mencari Data Analyst yang akan mengelola, membersihkan, dan mentransformasi data dari berbagai sumber menjadi data terstruktur untuk kebutuhan analitik dan pengembangan model AI. Anda akan membangun dashboard dan laporan untuk manajemen, serta berkolaborasi dengan tim bisnis dan IT dalam berbagai inisiatif transformasi digital di perusahaan.


Tanggung Jawab Utama :

  • Mengumpulkan, mengintegrasikan, dan mentransformasi data dari berbagai sumber (sistem lama, Excel, database, dll) menjadi satu sumber data terstruktur.

  • Melakukan data cleaning dan memastikan kualitas data (akurasi, konsistensi, kelengkapan).

  • Menyusun analisis dan laporan rutin/ad-hoc untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan manajemen.

  • Membangun dan mengelola dashboard kinerja bisnis (misalnya dengan Power BI/Tableau/Looker Studio).

  • Menyiapkan data untuk kebutuhan project AI/ML dan berkoordinasi dengan tim Data Scientist/AI Engineer atau vendor AI.


Kualifikasi & Keahlian :

  • Minimal S1: Statistika, Matematika, Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Ilmu Komputer, atau jurusan terkait.

  • Pengalaman sebagai Data Analyst / Business Intelligence minimal 1–3 tahun.

  • Menguasai SQL dan mampu menggunakan Python atau R untuk pengolahan serta analisis data.

  • Berpengalaman menggunakan tools BI/visualisasi data (Power BI / Tableau / Google Data Studio / Looker Studio).

  • Memahami konsep dasar ETL, statistik dasar, dan dasar-dasar machine learning/AI.

  • Komunikatif, teliti, memiliki kemampuan problem solving yang baik, dan mampu bekerja lintas tim (bisnis & IT).

  • Nilai Tambah

  • Pernah terlibat dalam proyek transformasi digital atau migrasi dari proses manual ke sistem digital.

  • Pengalaman dengan cloud platform (AWS / GCP / Azure) atau pembangunan data warehouse.

  • Memiliki sertifikasi terkait data (misalnya: Microsoft / Google Data Analytics).
title: DATA ANALYST - DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION & AI

description: About the job : Data Analyst will be responsible for collecting, processing, and analyzing large sets of data to provide actionable insights that support business decision-making. This role requires proficiency in data analysis tools, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to communicate com...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the job : 
Data Analyst will be responsible for collecting, processing, and analyzing large sets of data to provide actionable insights that support business decision-making. This role requires proficiency in data analysis tools, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to communicate complex findings clearly and effectively.

In this role, you will get to :
- Collect, clean, and organize large datasets from multiple sources.
- Perform data analysis to identify trends, patterns, and anomalies.
- Develop and maintain reports and dashboards for key stakeholders.
- Provide recommendations for process improvements based on data insights.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to support business goals.
- Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and consistency.
- Use statistical techniques and tools to interpret and present data findings.

What you will Need to Succeed :
- Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related field.
- Proven experience as a Data Analyst or similar role for minimum 2 years.
- Proficiency in data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, Python, or R.
- Having knowledge and understand about retail business.
- Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
- Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
- Willing to be placed at Kopo, Katapang, Bandung

description: We are a growing hotel management company overseeing multiple properties with a strong focus on operational excellence, cost efficiency, and data-driven decision-making. Our team is committed to maintaining high service standards while continuously improving financial and operational performance thr...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are a growing hotel management company overseeing multiple properties with a strong focus on operational excellence, cost efficiency, and data-driven decision-making. Our team is committed to maintaining high service standards while continuously improving financial and operational performance through structured analysis and effective cost control.

Job Description

  • Analyze financial and operational data to evaluate hotel performance and support management decision-making.

  • Monitor, control, and optimize costs in line with approved budgets and hotel operational KPIs.

  • Prepare regular reports and dashboards related to cost efficiency, performance, and operational insights.

  • Collaborate with operations, finance, and management teams to ensure cost control implementation is effective.

  • Utilize data analytics tools, including BI platforms and AI-based analytics tools, to improve accuracy and efficiency.

Requirements

  • Minimum 2–3 years of relevant experience, preferably in the hospitality or hotel management industry.

  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel with solid data analysis skills.

  • Experience using BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Data Studio, or other BI software is a strong advantage.

  • Experience in data analytics using AI tools is highly preferred.

  • Mandarin proficiency (minimum intermediate communication level) and English is mandatory.

  • Not open for fresh graduates or internship candidates.

  • Preferably with a notice period below 30 days or available to join immediately.
title: Data Analyst & Cost Control

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

  • Manage and deliver projects as well as daily analytical tasks in line with stakeholder requirements and business priorities.

  • Develop, implement, and maintain data strategies aligned with business objectives, including enforcing data governance standards to ensure data accuracy, integrity, and security.

  • Allocate, delegate, and monitor tasks across the team to ensure timely and effective project execution.

  • Bachelor’s degree in any major.

  • Minimum 2 years of experience as a Data Analyst Supervisor or in a comparable role.

  • Strong proficiency in data analysis tools, particularly Python and MySQL.

  • Strong proficiency in data visualization tools, particularly Power BI.

  • Excellent communication skills with strong critical thinking abilities, high attention to detail, and a strong commitment to accuracy.

  • Strong analytical mindset with the ability to provide forward-looking insights and value-added analysis.

  • Have good leadership and team management skills.

  • Willing to work at Head Office – Kelapa Gading, North Jakarta.

description: KesempatanKami mencari seorang Data Analyst yang berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di PT Surya Hutani Jaya yang bergerak di bidang Hutan Tanaman Industri. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam menganalisis dan membuat wawasan data yang dapat mendukung keputusan bisnis stra...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kesempatan
Kami mencari seorang Data Analyst yang berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami di PT Surya Hutani Jaya yang bergerak di bidang Hutan Tanaman Industri. Dalam peran ini, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam menganalisis dan membuat wawasan data yang dapat mendukung keputusan bisnis strategis perusahaan kami di Kalimantan Timur. Kandidat yang ideal memiliki keahlian analitik yang kuat, kemampuan komunikasi yang baik, dan antusias untuk mengubah data menjadi informasi yang dapat ditindaklanjuti.

Tanggung Jawab

  • Mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menafsirkan data dari berbagai sumber untuk menghasilkan wawasan yang dapat ditindaklanjuti.

  • Merancang dan membangun laporan, dashboard, dan visualisasi data yang dapat membantu pembuatan keputusan yang lebih baik.

  • Berkolaborasi dengan tim bisnis untuk memahami persyaratan analisis dan mengembangkan solusi yang disesuaikan.

  • Menggunakan keahlian statistik dan teknik pemodelan untuk mengekstrak tren, pola, dan wawasan dari data.

Persyaratan

  • Gelar Sarjana dalam Sains Data, Statistik, Ilmu Komputer, atau bidang terkait.

  • Minimal 2 tahun pengalaman di posisi analisis data atau peran terkait.

  • Pengetahuan yang kuat tentang alat dan teknik analisis data, seperti SQL, Python, R, Tableau, atau Power BI.

  • Kemampuan untuk menganalisis, memvisualisasikan, dan menyajikan wawasan data yang kompleks secara jelas dan efektif.

  • Kemampuan untuk beradaptasi dengan cepat dalam lingkungan yang berubah-ubah.

  • Able to work collaboratively in a team and across functions.

  • Good communication skills, fast learner, and self-motivated.

description: Key ResponsibilitiesDesign and implement ETL/ELT pipelines using Spark SQL and Python within Databricks Medallion architectureDevelop dimensional data models following star schema methodology with proper fact and dimension table design, SCD implementation, and optimization for analytical workloadsOp...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement ETL/ELT pipelines using Spark SQL and Python within Databricks Medallion architecture

  • Develop dimensional data models following star schema methodology with proper fact and dimension table design, SCD implementation, and optimization for analytical workloads

  • Optimize Spark SQL and DataFrame operations through appropriate partitioning strategies, clustering and join optimizations to maximize performance and minimize costs

  • Build comprehensive data quality frameworks with automated validation checks, statistical profiling, exception handling, and data reconciliation processes

  • Establish CI/CD pipelines incorporating version control, automated testing including but not limited to unit test, integration test, smoke test, etc.

  • Implement data governance standards including row-level and column-level security policies for access controls and compliance requirements

  • Create and maintain technical documentation including ERDs, schema specifications, data lineage diagrams, and metadata repositories

Key Requirements

  • 3+ years’ experience with SparkSQL, Python and PySpark for data engineering workflow

  • Strong proficiency in dimensional modeling and star schema design for analytical workloads

  • Experience implementing automated testing and CI/CD pipelines for data workflows

  • Familiarity with GitHub operations and collaborative development practices

  • Demonstrated ability to optimize engineering workflow jobs for performance and cost efficiency

  • Experience with cloud data services and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP)

  • Proficiency with IDE tools such as Visual Studio Code for efficient development

  • Experience with Databricks platform will be a plus

jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement ETL/ELT pipelines using Spark SQL and Python within Databricks Medallion architecture

  • Develop dimensional data models following star schema methodology with proper fact and dimension table design, SCD implementation, and optimization for analytical workloads

  • Optimize Spark SQL and DataFrame operations through appropriate partitioning strategies, clustering and join optimizations to maximize performance and minimize costs

  • Build comprehensive data quality frameworks with automated validation checks, statistical profiling, exception handling, and data reconciliation processes

  • Establish CI/CD pipelines incorporating version control, automated testing including but not limited to unit test, integration test, smoke test, etc.

  • Implement data governance standards including row-level and column-level security policies for access controls and compliance requirements

  • Create and maintain technical documentation including ERDs, schema specifications, data lineage diagrams, and metadata repositories

Key Requirements

  • 3+ years’ experience with SparkSQL, Python and PySpark for data engineering workflow

  • Strong proficiency in dimensional modeling and star schema design for analytical workloads

  • Experience implementing automated testing and CI/CD pipelines for data workflows

  • Familiarity with GitHub operations and collaborative development practices

  • Demonstrated ability to optimize engineering workflow jobs for performance and cost efficiency

  • Experience with cloud data services and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or GCP)

  • Proficiency with IDE tools such as Visual Studio Code for efficient development

  • Experience with Databricks platform will be a plus

description: Job DescriptionWe are a technology company building automated systems that analyze financial market data and generate quantitative trading signals.We are looking for a Quantitative Software Engineer (Python) to design, test, and optimize strategy logic using real-time and historical market data.This...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are a technology company building automated systems that analyze financial market data and generate quantitative trading signals.

We are looking for a Quantitative Software Engineer (Python) to design, test, and optimize strategy logic using real-time and historical market data.

This role sits at the intersection of software engineering, data analysis, and quantitative modeling.

⸻

Responsibilities

• Build and maintain market data processing pipelines in Python

• Design and implement backtesting frameworks

• Develop trading logic, filters, and signal models

• Analyze strategy performance and risk metrics

• Model volatility, spreads, and execution behavior

• Collaborate with backend engineers to deploy strategies into production systems

• Continuously improve models based on live performance data

⸻

Requirements

• Strong Python programming skills

• Experience with data analysis libraries (pandas, numpy, etc.)

• Understanding of probability, statistics, and time-series data

• Experience building or using backtesting systems

• Clean coding practices and version control (Git)

• Ability to translate mathematical logic into reliable software

⸻

Nice to Have

• Background in financial markets or trading systems

• Experience with large datasets or streaming data

• Familiarity with SQL or data warehousing

• Knowledge of Rust or other systems languages

• Experience with performance optimization

⸻

Benefits

• Competitive salary

• Performance-based bonuses

• Flexible working arrangement

• Opportunity to work on advanced financial data systems

• Long-term career growth in fintech and quantitative engineering
title: Quantitative Software Engineer (Python) – Market Data & Strategy

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description :

  1. Lead technicians during machine trials for machine development and modification.

  2. Monitor machine trial activities to ensure compliance with specified standards and requirements.

  3. Oversee periodic machine calibration performed by technicians to ensure adherence to established standards.

  4. Prepare evaluation and observation reports when issues occur on automated machines.

  5. Analyze operational data to identify improvement opportunities in automation processes.

  6. Coordinate troubleshooting and repair activities in the event of machine disturbances or failures.

  7. Report machine performance progress and trial effectiveness to the Engineer.

  8. Coordinate routine inspections and preventive maintenance of automation machines with the technician team.

  9. Perform final verification of machines after repairs or improvements before they are put back into operation.


Requirements :

Associate's Degree in Mechatronics or related field with a minimum GPA of 3.00.

Knowledge of manufacturing processes.

At least 1 year of working experience; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

Strong analytical and logical thinking skills.

Eager to learn with good communication skills.

Able to work both in a team and independently.

Placement in Karawang area.


Notes: Onsite Recruitment at Diponegoro University 28–30 January 2026

description: Deskripsi Pekerjaan:Melakukan pemantauan terhadap kondisi server dan hasil vulnerability assessment untuk mendeteksi potensi risiko keamanan (security risk) pada lapisan Operating System (OS)Melakukan remediasi terhadap vulnerability pada Operating System, sehingga server tetap dalam kondisi aman, s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Deskripsi Pekerjaan:

  • Melakukan pemantauan terhadap kondisi server dan hasil vulnerability assessment untuk mendeteksi potensi risiko keamanan (security risk) pada lapisan Operating System (OS)

  • Melakukan remediasi terhadap vulnerability pada Operating System, sehingga server tetap dalam kondisi aman, stabil, dan sesuai standar keamanan yang berlaku

  • Menganalisa penyebab (root cause analysis) dari masalah atau hambatan dalam patching OS, serta memastikan tindakan pencegahan dilakukan agar permasalahan tidak terulang

  • Melakukan perubahan (change) pada konfigurasi Operating System dalam rangka penerapan patch keamanan, sesuai prosedur yang berlaku

  • Mendokumentasikan seluruh request patch, hasil eksekusi, serta bukti eviden

Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal Diploma/S1 Jurusan IT, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer atau yang relevan

  • Pengalaman minimal 1 tahun (junior) dan 5 tahun (senior) dibidang IT Engineer (Security/Network, System/Application)

  • Memahami arsitektur IT System, Security, Network, dan Application

  • Berpengalaman implementasi, operasional, patching/upgrade, serta penanganan major incident pada Linux (redhat & oracle), Solaris, dan Windows

  • Menguasai Security Best Practices OS level, dokumentasi teknis, dan/atau ITIL change & release management

  • Pengalaman di perbankan/keuangan, kepemilikan sertifikasi teknis, penguasaan tools enterprise patch management, dan pengalaman leadership/manajemen tim menjadi nilai tambah

  • Memiliki kemampuan analisis, komunikasi tertulis & verbal, serta koordinasi stakeholder yang baik

  • Bersedia project-based dengan sistem kerja shifting
title: IT Patch Management

description: About AME Group:The AME Group is a global data analytics and research company. We offer technical, market expertise and research analytics on the Materials Sector. This includes renewables, energy transition, metals and carbon emissions for the energy, and infrastructure sectors. AME has a flat mana...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About AME Group:
The AME Group is a global data analytics and research company. We offer technical, market expertise and research analytics on the Materials Sector. This includes renewables, energy transition, metals and carbon emissions for the energy, and infrastructure sectors. AME has a flat management structure and encourages wide engagement across the firm.

Our team of engineers, economists, scientists, financial experts, and programmers produces world-class, independent research. We focus on the technical intricacies of on-site engineering and market analysis. Governments, NGOs, fund managers, primary producers, and the financial sector use our analysis and research platforms to drive technological change, plan greenfield projects, and develop low-carbon plant expansions.

What We Do:

  • Expand research capabilities in renewables, battery metals, transition commodities, and new energy sectors like hydrogen.

  • Analyze individual projects such as solar farms, mines, and infrastructure operations to deliver economic and planning insights.

  • Build industry and plant engineering models and catalog carbon emission data using technical papers, production data, financial metrics, surveys, and site visits.

Our 2025 Focus:
This year, we are prioritizing South East Asia, particularly Indonesia. We are establishing a Jakarta office as our regional hub and are eager to collaborate with Indonesian professionals.

About the Role

We’re looking for a Data Engineer to design, implement, and maintain reliable data pipelines that collect and process data from various public APIs into a centralized blob storage and database environment. You’ll play a key role in ensuring data is ingested efficiently, transformed cleanly, and made accessible for downstream analysis and reporting.

This role involves working with Python-based ETL pipelines, workflow orchestration (Apache Airflow or equivalent), and cloud storage solutions (e.g., Azure Blob Storage).


Key Responsibilities

  • Design and implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines to extract data from multiple public APIs and load into blob storage and relational databases.

  • Build and manage scheduled workflows using tools such as Apache Airflow (or similar).

  • Handle complex API integrations, authentication flows (OAuth2, API keys), pagination, and rate limiting.

  • Structure data in blob storage (e.g., Azure Blob) for efficient downstream access.

  • Transform and load data into structured SQL-based databases for analytics and access by Web applications

  • Implement monitoring, logging, and validation to ensure data integrity and pipeline reliability.

  • Work closely with data scientists, and software developers to ensure data availability and usability.

  • Maintain clear documentation for data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

  • 3+ years of experience building data pipelines in a production environment.

  • Strong understanding of ETL/ELT architecture, API data ingestion, and data modelling principles.

  • Experience with Azure

Technical Skills:

  • Languages: Python (preferred), SQL (Microsoft T-SQL)

  • Orchestration: Apache Airflow or similar

  • RESTful API integration (authentication, pagination, error handling)

  • Azure Blob Storage

  • Familiarity with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines

Nice to Have:

  • Experience integrating data from open economic and financial APIs (e.g., World Bank, IMF, OECD, UN Data, FRED)

  • Familiarity with large structured and semi-structured datasets (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and associated performance considerations

  • Experience building incremental ingestion or change data capture (CDC) pipelines

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset

  • Clear communication of technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

  • Attention to detail and data accuracy

  • Proactive approach to monitoring

What We Offer

  • Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities

  • Competitive salary

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in computer science/information technology/electrical or equivalent.

  • Minimum 1 year experience as Network Engineer, Network Security Engineer, IT Infrastructure, or IT Support (Fresh Graduate are welcome).

  • Passionate in the field of cyber/Network Security.

  • Candidates must be quick learner, good communication skills, problem-solving mindset, and ability to work in a team.

  • Strong understanding of TCP/IP-based services, routing & switching, VLAN, subnetting, VPN, DNS, and DHCP.

  • Strong understanding of Firewall/etc and its tool.

  • Familiar with network monitoring tools, log analysis, and basic cyber security concepts.

  • Exposure with network/security equipment (Cisco, Juniper, Palo Alto, Fortinet, etc).

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience).

  • 3+ years of experience building data pipelines in a production environment.

  • Strong understanding of ETL/ELT architecture, API data ingestion, and data modelling principles.

  • Experience with Azure

Technical Skills:

  • Languages: Python (preferred), SQL (Microsoft T-SQL)

  • Orchestration: Apache Airflow or similar

  • RESTful API integration (authentication, pagination, error handling)

  • Azure Blob Storage

  • Familiarity with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines

Nice to Have:

  • Experience integrating data from open economic and financial APIs (e.g., World Bank, IMF, OECD, UN Data, FRED)

  • Familiarity with large structured and semi-structured datasets (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and associated performance considerations

  • Experience building incremental ingestion or change data capture (CDC) pipelines

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset

  • Clear communication of technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

  • Attention to detail and data accuracy

  • Proactive approach to monitoring

What We Offer

  • Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities

  • Competitive salary
title: Data Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

You will play a key role in supporting the Sales team by handling sales administration, coordinating with various departments, and ensuring timely processing of documents and reports. Your responsibilities will include preparing sales quotations, managing customer orders, following up on sales or parts orders, and maintaining data accuracy for reporting and analysis. You will collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to ensure operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

Responsibilities

  • Handle sales inquiries

  • Prepare sales quotations (SQ), costings, and unit selection

  • Process and follow up on customer Purchase Orders (PO)

  • Coordinate with Finance Department for invoicing and payment follow-up

  • Coordinate with Supply Chain Department for order and delivery scheduling

  • Place orders for factory and local parts

  • Input and manage data in Service Database

  • Prepare monthly Service Outlook Reports

  • Manage travel requests (TR) and expense reports (CA) for Sales team

  • Provide general administrative support including document filing

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s / Diploma Degree in Engineering (HVAC, Mechanical, or Industrial preferred)

  • At least 1-2 years of relevant experience in sales order processing and coordination

  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office, especially Excel / Spreadsheet

  • Good command of English, both spoken and written

  • High attention to detail and accuracy in data entry

  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

  • Able to manage multiple tasks with good time management

Advantages

  • Understanding with B2B sales process

  • Familiarity with ERP systems is a plus

  • Previous experience in HVAC industry or Basic understanding of HVAC systems is preferred

description: Junior Data Engineer (Web Scrapping)📍 Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia (On-site)💼 Employment Type: Full-time💰 Salary: IDR 6M - 10M (depending on experience)About the RoleWe’re looking for a Junior Data Engineer with a strong foundation in web scraping to join our data team. You’ll play a key r...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Junior Data Engineer (Web Scrapping)

📍 Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia (On-site)
💼 Employment Type: Full-time
💰 Salary: IDR 6M - 10M (depending on experience)

About the Role

We’re looking for a Junior Data Engineer with a strong foundation in web scraping to join our data team. You’ll play a key role in developing and maintaining automated scraping systems, transforming raw data into structured, meaningful datasets, and ensuring the accuracy and reliability of the outputs.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and maintain web scrapers to extract data from various websites and APIs.

  • Extract, clean, and transform raw output from scrapers to meet user requirements.

  • Build automation scripts on top of scrapers (e.g., combining multiple outputs, automating scraper monitoring, logging, and error handling).

  • Ensure the accuracy, quality, and consistency of scraped data through testing and validation.

  • Collaborate with team members to optimize scraping workflows and improve data pipelines.

Requirements

Must-Have Skills:

  • Proficiency in Python and SQL, especially for web scraping and data manipulation tasks.

  • Basic experience with web scraping tools and frameworks, such as Scrapy, Selenium, HTTPX, or Requests.

  • Ability to extract structured and unstructured data (HTML, JSON, CSV) using tools like BeautifulSoup, dataclasses/pydantic, and regular expressions (regex).

  • Experience in storing and querying data in SQL databases.

  • Strong attention to detail, critical thinking, and problem-solving skills to handle data inconsistencies, implement error handling, and ensure scraper reliability.

  • Good English proficiency

Nice-to-Have Skills:

  • Familiarity with Git or other version control tools for collaboration.

  • Experience using task schedulers (e.g., cronjobs, Airflow) to automate scraping workflows.

  • Understanding of containerization technologies like Docker.

Why You’ll Love Working Here

  • Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact.

  • Collaborate with talented data engineers and analysts to solve real business challenges.

  • Based in beautiful Bali, working directly on-site with a passionate and talented team.

  • If relocating from other parts of Indonesia, we offer one-time reimbursement for flights and relocation expenses.
title: Junior Data Engineer (Web Scrapping)

Job Role

Assist the 1st operator in the production tasks of the shift and maintenance of the equipment, and to achieve the goals of quality, efficiency, etc.

Qualifications

  • Minimum Bachelor Degree, preferred from the Engineering major.

  • Basic use of Microsoft office tools.

  • Good english communication and teamwork skills.

  • Able to work under pressure Willing to rotate shifts Able to load/push heavy weight.

  • Have good communication skills, able to work with teams and work units that intersect.

  • Understand and implement the principles of Occupational Health and Safety (K3) in the work area.

  • Demonstrate work responsibilities, be able to develop work plans and priorities as needed, and pay attention to details.

  • Work placement: Cikande - Serang area.

description:
Company Description


About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excel...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

About Grab and Our Workplace

Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.

Job Description

Get to know the Role

We are seeking a visionary Data Engineer to join our innovative team in Jakarta, Indonesia. As a key member of our data engineering department, you will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining our data infrastructure to support critical business decisions and drive organizational growth.

The Critical Tasks You Will Perform

  • Design and and develop robust, scalable data pipelines to ensure seamless data flow across multiple systems

  • Write functionally correct, modular, and maintainable SQL queries and data transformation code (Spark)

  • Work with common data storage systems and databases, including data warehouses and distributed data systems

  • Apply fundamental data modeling concepts to simple and moderately complex datasets

  • Collaborate with diverse teams including Data Scientists, Analysts, and Software Engineers to deliver data solutions

  • Participate in code reviews to maintain data pipeline quality and share knowledge

  • Respond promptly to data pipeline issues and maintain runbooks, dashboards, and alerts

  • Ensure data quality and reliability through appropriate testing and monitoring

Qualifications

What Essential Skills You Will Need

  • Min 3+ years of relevant experience in data engineering or related field

  • Proficiency in SQL for querying and manipulating large-scale datasets

  • Proficiency in programming language commonly used in data engineering (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java)

  • Experience with data pipeline frameworks and ETL tools (e.g., Apache Spark, Airflow, or similar)

  • Familiarity with data warehousing concepts and platforms (e.g., Hive, Presto, BigQuery, or Snowflake)

  • Computer Science fundamentals in algorithms and data structures, with capability to apply them to data problems

  • Understanding of data modeling principles and database design

  • Experience with version control systems like Git

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field

Additional Information

Life at Grab

We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:

  • We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
  • With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
  • Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
  • We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.

What We Stand For At Grab

We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

description: Job Description :Ensure the implementation of process designs involving machines, materials, and work methods, and ensure melting and casting processes follow established standards.Guide and support the team in developing tooling designs to improve production efficiency and product quality.Monitor p...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description :

  1. Ensure the implementation of process designs involving machines, materials, and work methods, and ensure melting and casting processes follow established standards.

  2. Guide and support the team in developing tooling designs to improve production efficiency and product quality.

  3. Monitor process controls, identify deviations, and take corrective actions to maintain consistent product quality.

  4. Lead process improvement activities by analyzing production data and recommending changes to improve efficiency and quality.

  5. Coordinate daily team activities to ensure effective implementation of process designs and improvements in the melting and casting area.

  6. Communicate with related departments to ensure all aspects of process engineering are smoothly integrated into production operations.

  7. Handle technical issues during production that cannot be resolved by the engineering staff.

  8. Provide training and development to the team on updated technologies and methods in process engineering.

  9. Review documents and daily reports to identify existing problems and opportunities for improvement.


Requirements :

Bachelor's degree in Metallurgical Engineering or related field with a minimum GPA of 3.00.

Knowledge of manufacturing processes.

At least 1 year of working experience; fresh graduates are encouraged to apply.

Strong analytical and logical thinking skills.

Eager to learn with good communication skills.

Able to work both in a team and independently.

Placement in Karawang area.


Notes: Onsite Recruitment at Diponegoro University 28–30 January 2026

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.

  • Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.

  • Collaborate with:

- Business Analysts on reporting and dashboards

- Data Scientists on feature and dataset preparation

- Software Engineers on data integrations

  • Maintain clear documentation for data pipelines, schemas, and processes.

  • Implement best practices for data security, access control, and governance.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline failures or performance issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL.

  • Experience with at least one programming language: Python, Scala, or Java

  • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g., BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Understanding of data modeling concepts (star schema, normalization, etc.).

  • Experience working with large datasets and production data systems.

  • Experience supporting BI tools (Looker, Power BI, Tableau)

  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus

  • Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines will be preferred

description: Responsibilities:Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalabi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT data pipelines.

  • Integrate data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, streaming systems).

  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and consistency through validation and monitoring.

  • Optimize data pipelines for performance, cost, and scalability.

  • Collaborate with:

- Business Analysts on reporting and dashboards

- Data Scientists on feature and dataset preparation

- Software Engineers on data integrations

  • Maintain clear documentation for data pipelines, schemas, and processes.

  • Implement best practices for data security, access control, and governance.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve data pipeline failures or performance issues.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business, Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.

  • 3–5 years of experience in data engineering or related roles.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL.

  • Experience with at least one programming language: Python, Scala, or Java

  • Hands-on experience with data warehouses (e.g., BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake).

  • Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure.

  • Understanding of data modeling concepts (star schema, normalization, etc.).

  • Experience working with large datasets and production data systems.

  • Experience supporting BI tools (Looker, Power BI, Tableau)

  • Knowledge of containerization and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes) is a plus

  • Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines will be preferred
