jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced Data Engineer to join our dynamic team at our client in PT Reasuransi Indonesia Utama in Jakarta. As a full-time Data Engineer, you will play a crucial role in designing, building, and maintaining our data infrastructure. This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the strategic objectives of our organisation and drive data-driven decision-making.

What you'll be doing

  • Design and develop robust, scalable, and efficient data pipelines to collect, process, and transform data from various sources

  • Implement and maintain data warehousing and data lake solutions to ensure reliable and secure storage of data

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions

  • Optimise data processing workflows and implement strategies to improve performance and reliability

  • Develop and maintain documentation for data models, pipeline processes, and operational procedures

  • Monitor and troubleshoot data issues, identifying and resolving bottlenecks and data quality problems

  • Contribute to the continuous improvement of our data architecture and engineering practices

What we're looking for

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree (S1) in Mathematics or a related field

  • Minimum 3 years of experience as a Data Engineer or in a similar role

  • Strong knowledge of data engineering and data management

  • Experience in ETL processes (Extract, Transform, Load)

  • Ability to provide and consolidate data from multiple data sources

  • Experience in system-to-system data integration

  • Proficient in SQL, including standard and advanced queries

  • Hands-on experience building data pipelines using Oracle and PostgreSQL databases

What we offer

At PT. Padepokan Tujuh Sembilan', we are committed to providing a supportive and enriching work environment. Some of the key benefits we offer include:

Competitive salary and bonuses
Comprehensive health insurance and retirement benefits
Opportunities for professional development and career advancement
Flexible work arrangements and a healthy work-life balance
Collaborative and inclusive team culture

About us

PT. Padepokan Tujuh Sembilan' is a leading provider of information and communication technology solutions in Indonesia. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we have established a reputation for delivering cutting-edge products and services to a diverse range of clients. Our mission is to empower organisations with data-driven insights and technology-driven solutions that drive sustainable growth and success.

If you are passionate about data engineering and eager to join a dynamic and forward-thinking team, we encourage you to apply now.

title: IT Data Engineer Staff

description: The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements int...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Data Transformation Functional is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable data pipelines and transformation processes that enable reliable data flow across systems. This role bridges business needs and technical implementation by translating functional data requirements into optimized data models and ETL/ELT workflows.

The engineer ensures data is properly cleansed, structured, and enriched for analytical and operational use—supporting reporting, business intelligence (BI), data science, and digital initiatives. The position requires strong skills in data modeling, SQL, and cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, AWS, Azure, GCP), with an understanding of data governance, quality, and performance optimization.


Job Description:

  1. Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT pipelines for data ingestion, transformation, and integration.

  2. Collaborate with business and analytics teams to define data requirements and translate them into technical solutions.

  3. Build and optimize data models to support BI tools, dashboards, and advanced analytics.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and compliance with data governance policies.

  5. Automate data workflows and monitor pipeline performance for reliability and scalability.

  6. Work closely with data architects and functional teams to improve overall data ecosystem efficiency.


Job Requirement:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Information Systems, or a related field; Master’s degree is a plus.

  • Experience in data engineering, data transformation, or data integration roles is a plus. Fresh Grad is welcome.

  • Proven experience designing, developing, and maintaining ETL/ELT data pipelines for structured and semi-structured data using tools such as dbt, Informatica, Talend, or Apache Airflow.

  • Hands-on experience working with cloud-based data platforms such as Snowflake, Databricks, Google BigQuery, Amazon Redshift, or Azure Synapse.

  • Strong proficiency in SQL and practical experience with at least one programming language (e.g., Python, Scala, or Java) for automation and data manipulation.

  • Demonstrated experience integrating and preparing data for Business Intelligence (BI) tools, such as Power BI, Qlik Sense, or Tableau, ensuring optimized data structures for visualization and analysis.

  • Experience collaborating closely with business analysts, functional teams, and data consumers to translate business requirements into technical data solutions.

  • Exposure to version control systems (Git) and CI/CD workflows, ideally within an Agile development environment.

Technical skills:

  • SQL, Python, or Scala.

  • TL/ELT tools (e.g., dbt, Informatica, Talend).

  • Cloud data platforms (e.g., Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, Redshift).

  • CI/CD and version control (e.g., Git, Jenkins)

Soft skills:

  • Analytical Thinking Ability to interpret complex data processes, identify root causes of issues, and propose practical solutions.

  • Business Acumen Understands business processes and can translate functional requirements into technical data solutions that add measurable value.

  • Communication Skills Able to communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders, including data architects, analysts, and business users.

  • Collaboration & Teamwork Works effectively within cross-functional teams, fostering cooperation between IT, data, and business units.

  • Problem-Solving Mindset Approaches challenges systematically, balancing technical precision with business needs.

  • Attention to Detail Ensures data accuracy and consistency throughout transformation and integration processes.

  • Continuous Learning Stays updated with emerging data technologies, engineering frameworks, and best practices.

jobDescriptionHtml:
It's fun to work in a company where people truly BELIEVE in what they're doing!

‎ 

‎ 

Job Description

The data warehouse engineering team plays an important role in the data team. We build, govern and maintain data warehouse platforms and environments as the foundation and source for every data product created by data analysts and scientists.

  • Define data model convention and governance

  • Design, develop and maintain data pipelines (external data source ingestion jobs, ETL/ELT jobs, etc)

  • Design, develop and maintain data pipeline framework (combined open source and internal software to build and govern data pipelines)

  • Create and manage data pipelines infrastructures 

  • Continuously seek ways to optimize existing data processing to be cost and time efficient

  • Ensure good data governance and quality through build monitoring systems to monitor data quality in data warehouse.

‎ 

Requirements

  • Minimum 1 year until 5 years experience (we are opening the roles across multiple levels).

  • Fluent in Python and advanced-SQL

  • Preferably familiar with data warehouse environments (eg: Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Snowflake)

  • Preferably familiar with data transformation or processing framework (eg: dbt, Dataform, Spark, Hive, etc)

  • Preferably familiar with data processing technology (Google Dataflow, Google Dataproc, etc)

  • Preferably familiar with orchestration tool (eg: Airflow, Argo, Azkaban, etc)

  • Understand data warehousing concept (eg: Kimball, Inmon, data vault, etc) and experience in data modeling and measure + improve data quality 

  • Preferably understand basic containerization and microservice concept (eg: Docker, Kubernetes) 

  • Having knowledge in machine learning, building robust API, and web development will be an advantage

  • Able to build and maintain good relationship with stakeholders

  • Able to translate business requirements to data warehouse modeling specifications

  • Able to demonstrate creative problem solving skill

  • A team player who loves to collaborate with others and can work independently when needed

‎ 

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

  • Preferably understand basic containerization and microservice concept (eg: Docker, Kubernetes) 

  • Having knowledge in machine learning, building robust API, and web development will be an advantage

  • Able to build and maintain good relationship with stakeholders

  • Able to translate business requirements to data warehouse modeling specifications

  • Able to demonstrate creative problem solving skill

  • A team player who loves to collaborate with others and can work independently when needed

‎ 

If you like wild growth and working with happy, enthusiastic over-achievers, you'll enjoy your career with us!

In this role, you will play a key part in...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Medior/Senior Data Engineer (Web Scrapping)

📍 Location: Denpasar, Bali, Indonesia (On-site)
💼 Employment Type: Full-time
💰 Salary: IDR 10M - 18M (depending on experience)

About the Role

We are looking for a Medior/Senior Data Engineer to join our team in Bali. In this role, you will play a key part in building and scaling production-grade web scrapers and supporting the Lead Data Engineer in technical decisions, project planning, and team coordination. You will also mentor junior and medior engineers while ensuring best practices are followed.

Responsibilities

  • Lead the development and maintenance of scalable, production-grade web scrapers.

  • Design, build, and maintain reusable scraper libraries and frameworks.

  • Define coding standards, workflows, and processes with the Lead Engineer.

  • Implement robust monitoring, testing, and alerting systems to ensure reliability.

  • Manage and optimize cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure) for large-scale scraping workloads.

  • Optimize compute, storage, and proxy usage for performance and cost efficiency.

  • Mentor and review code of junior and medior engineers.

  • Collaborate with stakeholders to prioritize backlog items and integrate scraper outputs into pipelines.

  • Act as second in command to the Lead Data Engineer for technical and project support.

Requirements

Must-Have Skills:

  • Strong proficiency in Python and SQL, with hands-on web scraping experience.

  • Deep knowledge of frameworks like Scrapy, Playwright, Selenium, and anti-bot strategies.

  • Experience designing reusable libraries, coding standards, and modular scraper frameworks.

  • Proficiency with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP/Azure), including compute, storage, and security basics.

  • Experience with Docker & Kubernetes for containerization and orchestration.

  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, Git workflows, and IaC tools (Terraform/CloudFormation).

  • Strong debugging, performance tuning, and large-scale scraper optimization skills.

  • Excellent English communication skills (written & verbal).

Nice-to-Have Skills:

  • Workflow orchestration (Airflow, Prefect, Dagster).

  • Observability/monitoring tools (Prometheus, Grafana, CloudWatch, ELK).

  • Cost optimization in cloud and proxy-heavy workloads.

  • Knowledge of data governance, RBAC, and compliance.

  • Exposure to downstream data engineering pipelines (ETL/ELT, APIs, databases).

Why You’ll Love Working Here

  • Be part of a data-driven company that values curiosity, precision, and impact.

  • Collaborate with talented data engineers and analysts to solve real business challenges.

  • Based in beautiful Bali, working directly on-site with a passionate and talented team.

  • If relocating from other parts of Indonesia, we offer one-time reimbursement for flights and relocation expenses.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Requirements

  • Lulusan S-1 Teknik Mesin, Manajemen Transportasi, Logistik, atau bidang terkait lainnya.

  • Berpengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang Fleet Management, Asset Management dengan minimal 2-3 tahun di posisi manajerial/kepemimpinan.

  • Memiliki pemahaman mendalam mengenai teknis kendaraan berat (trucking), siklus perawatan mesin, serta standar kelayakan unit sesuai regulasi transportasi yang berlaku.

  • Berpengalaman dalam mengoperasikan sistem ERP dan mahir menggunakan Microsoft Office Suite (terutama Excel untuk pengolahan data aset) atau Google Workspace.

  • Mampu mengelola data aset nasional dalam jumlah besar dan menerjemahkannya ke dalam laporan strategi perawatan.

  • Memiliki jiwa kepemimpinan yang kuat untuk membawahi tim dan berkoordinasi dengan tim workshop di berbagai wilayah.

  • Memiliki kemampuan pengambilan keputusan yang cepat dan tepat, terutama dalam menentukan kelayakan operasional unit demi kelancaran rantai pasok.

    • Mahir dalam pemecahan masalah operasional di lapangan, termasuk penanganan kendala teknis armada secara efektif dan efisien.

  • Bersedia ditempatkan di Tanah Merdeka, Cilincing, Jakarta Utara.


Job Description

  • Bertanggung jawab penuh dalam memastikan seluruh unit aset perusahaan dalam kondisi prima dan siap beroperasi (ready to use) untuk mendukung kebutuhan operasional logistik.

  • Memimpin dan mengawasi tim inspektor untuk memastikan inspeksi harian dilakukan secara ketat dan sesuai standar keselamatan sebelum unit mulai beroperasi.

  • Mengambil keputusan strategis terkait unit yang dinyatakan tidak layak jalan untuk segera diarahkan ke workshop (bengkel) guna proses maintenance atau perbaikan.

  • Mengelola dan memvalidasi data inventaris aset unit secara real-time di seluruh cabang (Jakarta, Kalimantan, Sumatera, dll.) untuk memastikan akurasi jumlah dan status kepemilikan aset.

  • Mengelola efisiensi cost perawatan aset serta memastikan cost yang dikeluarkan sebanding dengan peningkatan performa unit.

  • Menyusun laporan performa aset secara berkala kepada manajemen tingkat atas terkait status kerusakan, cost pemeliharaan, dan rencana penambahan/pengurangan aset.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Data Engineer

  1. Minimal S1 / Sederajat, (diutamakan jurusan Teknologi Informasi, Teknik Informatika, Ilmu Komputer, Manajemen Informatika, Teknik Komputer, Data Science, Matematika, Statistika, dan sejenisnya)

  3. Memiliki pengalaman dan kemampuan terkait PySpark, Oozie, Airflow, IBM Data Stage, Cloudera, Oracle, dsb;

  4. Lebih diutamakan memiliki pengalaman dalam menggunakan analytics tools seperti Excel, Tableau, atau Power BI

  5. Lebih diutamakan memiliki pengalaman dan/atau pengetahuan terkait Pemrograman/Scripting dalam Data Processing seperti Phyton, R, Java, dsb

  6. Lebih diutamakan memiliki pengalaman dan/atau pengetahuan terkait konsep data pipeline.

  7. Lebih diutamakan memiliki sertifikasi di bidang Data Engineer (SQL/Oracle/Cloudera) level intermediate.

  8. Lebih diutamakan memiliki pengalaman pengembangan aplikasi secara Agile

  9. Memiliki pengalaman pengembangan Data Warehouse
title: Data Engineer

description: Perform data analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning to support credit analytics, risk assessment, and business decision-making.Conduct data research, experimentation, and model development using Python/R and SQL on large, structured datasets.Collect, clean, validate, and analyze intern...
jobDescriptionHtml:
• Perform data analysis, statistical modeling, and machine learning to support credit analytics, risk assessment, and business decision-making.

  • Conduct data research, experimentation, and model development using Python/R and SQL on large, structured datasets.

  • Collect, clean, validate, and analyze internal and external data while ensuring data quality, consistency, and confidentiality.

  • Develop, implement, and monitor analytical models (e.g., regression, classification) relevant to credit behavior and portfolio performance.

  • Translate complex analytical results into clear insights, reports, dashboards, and visualizations using BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau).

  • Collaborate with Product, Risk, Business, and IT teams to support data-driven initiatives and digital transformation.

  • Apply best practices in data governance, data privacy, and compliance within a regulated environment.

  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field with a minimum of 2 years’ experience in data analysis, data science, or a related role, strong analytical skills, and the ability to communicate insights effectively.

  • Conduct data research, experimentation, and model development using Python/R and SQL on large, structured datasets.

  • Collect, clean, validate, and analyze internal and external data while ensuring data quality, consistency, and confidentiality.

  • Develop, implement, and monitor analytical models (e.g., regression, classification) relevant to credit behavior and portfolio performance.

  • Translate complex analytical results into clear insights, reports, dashboards, and visualizations using BI tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau).

  • Collaborate with Product, Risk, Business, and IT teams to support data-driven initiatives and digital transformation.

  • Apply best practices in data governance, data privacy, and compliance within a regulated environment.

  • Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field with a minimum of 2 years’ experience in data analysis, data science, or a related role, strong analytical skills, and the ability to communicate insights effectively.

description: Job DescriptionWe are looking for an analytical and business-oriented IT Data Scientist to support data-driven decision-making across the organization. This role will focus on developing predictive models, extracting insights from complex datasets, and translating analytical results into actionable ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

We are looking for an analytical and business-oriented IT Data Scientist to support data-driven decision-making across the organization. This role will focus on developing predictive models, extracting insights from complex datasets, and translating analytical results into actionable business recommendations.

You will work closely with IT, business, and analytics stakeholders to drive value through data, improve operational performance, and support strategic initiatives.


Responsibilities

  • Analyze large, structured, and unstructured datasets to identify trends, patterns, and business insights.

  • Develop, validate, and deploy statistical models, machine learning algorithms, and predictive analytics solutions.

  • Translate complex data findings into clear insights and recommendations for business stakeholders.

  • Collaborate with data engineers and IT teams to ensure data quality, availability, and scalability.

  • Design and maintain dashboards, reports, and data visualizations to support decision-making.

  • Support experimentation, forecasting, and scenario analysis to improve business outcomes.

  • Ensure adherence to data governance, security, and compliance standards.

  • Document models, methodologies, and analytical processes.


Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field.

  • Proven experience in data analysis, data science, or advanced analytics roles.

  • Strong proficiency in Python or R, SQL, and data manipulation techniques.

  • Familiarity with data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau).

  • Strong understanding of probability, statistics, and analytical problem-solving.

  • Experience working with large datasets and cloud-based analytics platforms is an advantage.

description: Company DescriptionViahart was founded in 2010. We are an innovative consumer products company. We design, manufacture, and distribute consumer products ranging from educational toys & sporting goods to cell phone & AI-powered electronic accessories. We also offer innovative logistics and manufactur...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Company Description

Viahart was founded in 2010. We are an innovative consumer products company. We design, manufacture, and distribute consumer products ranging from educational toys & sporting goods to cell phone & AI-powered electronic accessories. We also offer innovative logistics and manufacturing services. Because we sell worldwide and make our products in different countries (not just China), we’ve built a base to navigate tariffs and changes in global trade. The company is not owned by private equity and the owners, employees, and their families use the products we make. Our business has been featured in the Wall Street Journal, on television (CNBC and NBC), and in the New York Times. Learn more about our company at https://viahart.com/

Job Responsibilities

  • Forecasting sales and inventory for purchasing

  • Optimizing our inventory across multiple locations

  • Monitoring our sales vs. forecasts and seasonality patterns

  • Determining the root cause of inventory discrepancies

  • Pricing our products in the US, for retail stores, and for international sales

  • Checking the algorithms, calculations, and logic of our in-house custom built software (spreadsheet formulas required, programming is not)

  • Commenting and explaining any (spreadsheet) code or algorithms you write

  • Monitoring the profitability of our products

  • Simplifying the logic in our software both in our spreadsheets and with our developer

  • Building data dashboards

  • Logging data

  • Using data to determine causality and identify issues that need our attention

  • Updating process documents (SOP) so others know how to use the analysis and systems you have built

Skills required

  • Clear written and verbal English communication

  • Strong mathematical skills

  • Proficiency with spreadsheet formulas (Google Sheets, Excel)

  • Ability to understand the logic of software systems (coding not required, except for formulas)

  • Ability to use AI tools effectively, using reasoning and strong verification skills

  • Love numbers and be able to identify the relationship between them and what is happening the real world

  • High attention of detail and strong sense of responsibility for the quality of your work

  • Self-motivated and able to work independently

Location

  • You may start remote and then transition to an in-office position in Sudirman business district (Indonesia), 5 days a week

  • You must be able to join our semi-weekly 9 AM Texas Time meeting when needed. (9PM Indonesia Time) (no longer than 30 minutes)


Work commitment and availability required.

This is a full-time position requiring a minimum of 40 hours a week of good work! This position is not compatible with activities or commitments that limit daily availability. Candidates must be able to work consistently during agreed working hours and be available during the workday. If you cannot commit to a full-time schedule, this role will not be a fit for you.

Compensation and Benefits

  • Salary ranges from 27,830,000 to 36,300,000 IDR

  • You will be paid in USD ($1,645 to $2,147USD a month)

  • Bonuses are given at the beginning of every February based on MERIT. These range from 0% to 15% of yearly salary.

  • Salary and benefits are negotiable

We may conduct reference checks as part of our hiring process to ensure we bring on honest, hardworking, and capable people.

jobDescriptionHtml:
We only hire the best. Join our elite consulting team—English fluency is a must to work with global clients and experts.

Datapower is a leading fintech consulting company specializing in personal digital lending, credit risk modeling, fraud detection, and AI-driven operational marketing. We empower Banks, Multi-finance companies, and other financial institutions in Southeast Asia and Africa with innovative AI-driven solutions.

As we expand our presence in Indonesia, we are looking for high-potential consultants with strong capabilities in data analytics, statistics and machine learning to join our expert team.


What You’ll Do

  • Work on data-driven fintech consulting projects across credit risk, fraud detection, and marketing analytics

  • Build, analyze, and optimize machine learning models for client-specific use cases

  • Extract insights from financial, behavioral, and alternative data sources (e.g., SLIK, app data, transactions)

  • Support client implementation and documentation of analytical models

  • Collaborate with data scientists, business analysts, and industry experts across project phases


Who We’re Looking For

We are seeking top-tier university graduates with outstanding academic performance (GPA ≥ 3.5/4.0).

(Majors: Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, Data Science, Financial engineering)

Technical Skills:

  • Solid understanding of machine learning and statistical algorithms

  • Proficient in Python and SQL

  • Familiarity with model evaluation, feature engineering, and data visualization

Mindset: Analytical thinker, proactive problem-solver, and collaborative team playerPreferred Qualifications

  • Internship or work experience in data science or analytics roles

  • Exposure to financial services, fintech, or credit scoring projects

  • Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., GCP, AWS) is a plus

  • Able to join immediately


If you’re ready to accelerate your career, work with global experts, and create real impact for banks and fintechs across Southeast Asia and Africa, apply now and be part of our journey.

jobDescriptionHtml:
KalGen DNA is seeking a passionate and detail-oriented Research and Development Officer to join our innovative team. This role plays a key part in developing new products and improving existing ones through scientific research and collaboration.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or related Life Sciences (Master’s degree preferred).

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a related research field.

  • Proficient in the use of PCR equipment and micropipetting techniques.

  • Having working experience in R&D is preferable.

  • Strong skills in planning, adaptability, SOP compliance, and performance monitoring.

  • Proficient in spoken and written English.


Job Description:

  • Conduct R&D activities based on scientific principles to develop or enhance products.

  • Assist in estimating costs, resources, and timelines for research projects, and monitor progress to ensure targets are met.

  • Collaborate with researchers, inventors, and research institutions to maintain and expand technical expertise.

  • Lead technology and process transfers from other manufacturers or companies.

  • Coordinate the diversification of raw materials, packaging, and new technologies for implementation in manufacturing processes.

  • Work with the QA department to carry out quality risk assessments for products and processes.

  • Prepare and review technical documentation such as the Design History File (DHF), Device Master Record (DMR), and Device History Record (DHR).

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including QA, QC, and Production.
title: Research & Development

description: Job DescriptionSummaryOur talented Data & AI Practice is made up of globally recognized experts - and there’s room for more analytical and ambitious data professionals. If you’re passionate about helping clients make better data-driven decisions to tackle their most complex business issues, let’s ta...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

Summary

Our talented Data & AI Practice is made up of globally recognized experts - and there’s room for more analytical and ambitious data professionals. If you’re passionate about helping clients make better data-driven decisions to tackle their most complex business issues, let’s talk. Take your skills to a new level and launch a career where you can truly do what matters.   

As an AI Engineer within our Data & AI Practice, you’ll leverage a client-centric approach to translate our client’s business strategy into solutions and services that lead to successful, impactful outcomes. You’ll engage in solutioning and support on the most strategic opportunities, intervene in high-risk complex deliveries, and contribute to shape the strategic direction around data architecture. Together we do what matters. 

Key Responsibilities

  • As an AI Engineer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy AI/ML solutions that address real-world business challenges.

  • Build, train, and optimize machine learning models, including supervised, unsupervised, and deep learning approaches.

  • Implement and maintain data pipelines, ensuring data quality and accessibility for model development and production.

  • Work with cloud platforms (such as Azure, AWS, or GCP) to operationalize AI solutions, leveraging services like Azure ML, Cognitive Services, or their equivalents.

  • Participate in code reviews, contribute to technical documentation, and support the integration of AI models into production systems.

  • Stay current with the latest AI/ML research, tools, and best practices, and proactively share knowledge with the team.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve issues in model performance, data quality, and deployment pipelines.

  • Communicate technical concepts and results to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Job Qualifications

Skills and experiences 

  • 4–6 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML engineering, including building and deploying models in production environments.

  • Proficiency in Python (must have), with experience in libraries such as scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar frameworks.

  • Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms, model evaluation, and feature engineering.

  • Experience with cloud AI/ML services (Azure ML, AWS SageMaker, GCP AI Platform) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) is highly regarded.

  • Familiarity with MLOps practices, version control (Git), and CI/CD pipelines for model deployment.

  • Working knowledge of data engineering concepts, including ETL processes and data pipeline orchestration.

  • Ability to analyze large datasets, perform data wrangling, and visualize results using tools like Power BI or matplotlib.

  • Strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, and a passion for continuous learning.
title: AI Engineer

description: We are looking for a Senior AI Engineer with solid experience in supply chain AI solutions and a strong understanding of software development/deployment. This role is crucial to building scalable AI solutions to solve core supply chain problems. You’ll not only be a key contributor within a high-imp...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Senior AI Engineer with solid experience in supply chain AI solutions and a strong understanding of software development/deployment. This role is crucial to building scalable AI solutions to solve core supply chain problems. You’ll not only be a key contributor within a high-impact engineering team but also help shape the team’s engineering culture through technical guidance and support to others.

Job Summary:

  • Design and develop modular, portable, and production-ready code that can be deployed across cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) or on-premise.

  • Re-architect and develop our existing system to support conversion of complex business and retail-specific requirements into scalable and reusable software components.

  • Design and build AI-driven systems components that seamlessly integrate research models into robust, scalable business solutions.

  • Follow and improve feature development cycles, software architecture patterns, coding standards, and DevOps/MLOps best practices across the engineering team.

  • Review code, support the development of a culture of engineering excellence, and ensure deliverables meet security, performance, and maintainability standards.


    Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Operations Research, or a related field.

  • 4+ years in AI/ML engineering or software engineering, focused on building and deploying production systems.

  • Experience deploying infrastructure as code on at least one major cloud service.

  • Experience deploying software in cloud and on-prem environments (using Docker, K8s, CI/CD pipelines)

  • Experience architecting microservices, API and system design

  • Proficient in Python and core technical stacks, including:
    - Databases: SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL) and NoSQL (e.g: MongoDB)
    - Testing frameworks: PyTest or equivalent for unit/integration testing tools

  • Previous experience with deployment of AI models to production, working with orchestration tools (e.g., Airflow, Prefect, Ray, etc.) and reporting tools (e.g. Tableau, Holistics) is a plus.

  • Previous experience with inventory optimization, demand forecasting, or supply chain AI solutions is a plus.

description: PT Usaha Kreatif Indonesia is hiring for AI EngineerResponsibilities :Design, build, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models for production use.Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into existing systems.Preprocess and analyze lar...
jobDescriptionHtml:
PT Usaha Kreatif Indonesia is hiring for AI Engineer

Responsibilities :

  • Design, build, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models for production use.

  • Collaborate with data scientists, software engineers, and product teams to integrate AI models into existing systems.

  • Preprocess and analyze large datasets for training and evaluation.

  • Research and experiment with the latest AI/ML algorithms, frameworks, and technologies.

  • Optimize model performance, scalability, and efficiency for real-world deployment.

  • Develop APIs or pipelines for model inference, monitoring, and automation.

  • Implement MLOps best practices including versioning, CI/CD, and model tracking.

  • Work on computer vision, NLP, recommendation systems, or generative AI projects (depending on company focus).

  • Document processes, models, and research findings clearly for internal and external stakeholders.

Requirements :

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or a related field.

  • Strong proficiency in Python and common ML libraries (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Hugging Face).

  • Experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.

  • Understanding of machine learning, deep learning architectures, and neural networks.

  • Familiarity with cloud AI platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) or MLOps tools (MLflow, Kubeflow, Airflow).

  • Knowledge of RESTful APIs and model deployment frameworks such as FastAPI or Flask.

  • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work in a collaborative, agile environment.

Preffered Skills :

  • Experience with LLMs (Large Language Models), LangChain, vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, FAISS).

  • Familiarity with computer vision (OpenCV, YOLO, Detectron2) or NLP (transformers, BERT, GPT).

  • Understanding of data pipelines and ETL processes.

  • Contribution to open-source AI projects or personal AI research portfolio.

  • Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).

jobDescriptionHtml:
About the Role

As an AI Engineer at Rolling Glory, you will design, build, and deploy AI-powered solutions that enhance digital products and business processes. You will work closely with Product Managers, Software Engineers, and Data teams to turn ideas into scalable, real-world AI applications.

Key Responsibilities
- Design, develop, and deploy AI/ML models for production use
- Work on use cases such as recommendation systems, NLP, computer vision, or predictive analytics
- Train, test, and optimize models for performance and accuracy
- Integrate AI models into existing applications and systems
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to define AI requirements
- Monitor and improve model performance over time
- Stay updated with the latest AI/ML trends and tools

Requirements
- 5+ years of experience in AI, Machine Learning, or Data Science
- Strong proficiency in Python and ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn)
- Experience with data processing and model deployment
- Solid understanding of machine learning algorithms and concepts
- Experience working with APIs, cloud platforms, or microservices

Nice to Have
- Experience with NLP (LLMs, chatbots, text analysis) or Computer Vision
- Experience deploying models on AWS / GCP / Azure
- Knowledge of MLOps, model monitoring, and CI/CD

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities

Operational Monitoring and Control - Budgeting

  • Mengelola pengembangan dan konsolidasi parameter penganggaran di kantor pusat (Head Office).

  • Melakukan penyesuaian atau modifi kasi yang diperlukan agar selaras dengan target keuangan perusahaan atau sebagai respons terhadap masukan dari hasil tinjauan.

Operational Monitoring and Control - Operational

  • Merumuskan proyek-proyek peningkatan/optimalisasi operasional

  • Memberikan panduan dan keahlian untuk membantu site dalam menyusun rencana mitigasi yang sesuai

  • Mengembangkan strategi untuk memastikan optimalisasi armada di seluruh site dengan memanfaatkan artificial intelligence (AI) dan machine learning (ML), analitik data, serta best practices guna meningkatkan utilisasi fleet, efisiensi, dan produktivitas

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan: Minimal gelar Sarjana (S1)

  • Pengalaman: Pengalaman kerja minimal 5 tahun di industri pertambangan batubara atau mineral, dengan setidaknya 3 tahun pengalaman spesifik di Mining/Operations Control Center (MCC/OCC).

  • Sertifikasi: Memiliki sertifikasi kompetensi pengawas operasional pertambangan (POP/POM)

  • Keahlian Teknis:

    • Pengalaman mendalam menggunakan Fleet Management Systems (FMS) dan sistem dispatch (misalnya, Modular, Minestar, Wenco).

    • Kemampuan kuat dalam analisis data operasional dan penggunaan Business Intelligence Tools (Power BI, Tableau).

    • Pemahaman dasar hingga menengah tentang penerapan AI/ML dalam konteks operasional tambang.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibility:

  • Data Gathering & Labeling: Improve AI by collecting and labeling gameplay data, identifying key moments, and ensuring accurate highlight detection.

  • Product Testing: Test Eklipse.gg across games, platforms, and devices to identify bugs and improve AI-driven highlights.

  • AI Performance Evaluation: Analyze AI-generated highlights for accuracy and relevance, and provide feedback for improvement.

  • Prompt Engineering: Optimize AI prompts for creating high-quality content tailored to platforms like TikTok and YouTube.

  • Collaboration: Work with other teams (Data, Marketing, AI) on data tasks, testing, and platform optimization.

  • Automation: Streamline processes by automating data handling, testing, and maintenance tasks.


Qualifications: 

  • Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Math, Statistics and related field.

  • Proficiency in English is a must, as this role requires collaboration with a global team.

  • Fresh Graduates or 1 year experience are welcome.

  • Passionate about gaming, streaming, and online content creation.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 

  • Detail-oriented and highly organized.

  • Basic understanding of data analysis and manipulation.

  • Basic programming/scripting skills (Python or similar preferred) for automation tasks are a plus.

  • Familiarity with AI concepts and machine learning is highly advantageous.

  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills.

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.

description: About UsWith over 25 years of excellence, PT Mitra Solusi Telematika (MST) is a trusted IT partner helping businesses thrive through innovation and integration. Our latest breakthrough, MissTika AI Platform, is a one-stop solution for RAG, summarization, ingestion, and API-based access—designed to b...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Us

With over 25 years of excellence, PT Mitra Solusi Telematika (MST) is a trusted IT partner helping businesses thrive through innovation and integration. Our latest breakthrough, MissTika AI Platform, is a one-stop solution for RAG, summarization, ingestion, and API-based access—designed to be scalable, secure, and enterprise-ready.

Now, we’re scaling into Agentic AI & Automation, and we’re looking for a visionary AI Engineer to help us build the future of serverless-first AI platforms.


What You’ll Do

As our AI Engineer, you’ll be at the heart of building intelligent, scalable, and secure AI systems:

  • Design and implement RAG pipelines using modern frameworks like LangChain and Hugging Face.

  • Develop agentic AI workflows with serverless-first architecture principles.

  • Build and optimize vector search systems using pgvector, Pinecone, or FAISS.

  • Architect serverless AI services on AWS and Azure, including Lambda, Step Functions, and API Gateway.

  • Create CI/CD pipelines for ML models and automate retraining and monitoring using MLFlow or Weights & Biases.

  • Deploy AI workloads on SageMaker and container-based inference endpoints.

  • Ensure system reliability and security through Docker, Kubernetes/ECS, and observability tools.

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams and contribute to scalable, secure, and enterprise-ready AI solutions.


What We’re Looking For

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field

  • 2–3 years of experience as an AI Engineer

  • Advanced proficiency in Python and familiarity with React or Flutter

  • Intermediate skills in Serverless compute, API Gateway, and .NET/Node.js

  • Strong experience with CI/CD pipelines, LLM frameworks, RAG, and Vector Databases

  • Hands-on experience with serverless GPU inference (e.g., SageMaker Asynchronous Inference, Azure ML batch endpoints)

  • Background in multi-cloud deployments across AWS and Azure

  • Familiarity with event-driven AI orchestration frameworks such as CrewAI, AutoGen, or LangGraph

  • Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects are a strong plus
title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer

jobDescriptionHtml:
As a Programmer, you will be responsible for supporting the development and maintenance of internal company applications. You will work closely with the ICT team, users, and cross-functional teams to ensure reliable system performance and effective digital solutions.


Key Responsibilities:

  1. Develop, enhance, and maintain internal company applications.

  2. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.

  3. Perform debugging, testing, and troubleshooting to ensure application quality and stability.

  4. Collaborate with ICT teams and users to understand system requirements and provide appropriate solutions.

  5. Support continuous improvement of applications by adopting new technologies when required.


Job Requirements:

  1. Minimum education of D3/S1 in Information Technology, Information Systems, or related fields.

  2. Basic knowledge of programming languages such as ASP.Net MVC / ASP.Net Core MVC.

  3. Experience developing a personal project or final assignment based on a web application (ASP.NET).

  4. Actively involved in application development within the last four years.

  5. Familiar with database systems (SQL & Oracle).

jobDescriptionHtml:
As a Programmer, you will be responsible for supporting the development and maintenance of internal company applications. You will work closely with the ICT team, users, and cross-functional teams to ensure reliable system performance and effective digital solutions.


Key Responsibilities:

  1. Develop, enhance, and maintain internal company applications.

  2. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.

  3. Perform debugging, testing, and troubleshooting to ensure application quality and stability.

  4. Collaborate with ICT teams and users to understand system requirements and provide appropriate solutions.

  5. Support continuous improvement of applications by adopting new technologies when required.


Job Requirements:

  1. Minimum education of D3/S1 in Information Technology, Information Systems, or related fields.

  2. Basic knowledge of programming languages such as ASP.Net MVC / ASP.Net Core MVC.

  3. Experience developing a personal project or final assignment based on a web application (ASP.NET).

  4. Actively involved in application development within the last four years.

  5. Familiar with database systems (SQL & Oracle).

  6. Strong understanding of the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).

  7. Understanding of Secure Programming, Automation, and Artificial Intelligence (AI) concepts.

  8. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

  9. High attention to detail and quality in coding and documentation.

  10. Ability to work both independently and in a team environment.

  11. Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies.

  12. Good communication skills in English and Bahasa Indonesia (written and verbal).

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Responsibilities

Operational Monitoring and Control - Budgeting

  • Mengelola pengembangan dan konsolidasi parameter penganggaran di kantor pusat (Head Office).

  • Melakukan penyesuaian atau modifi kasi yang diperlukan agar selaras dengan target keuangan perusahaan atau sebagai respons terhadap masukan dari hasil tinjauan.

Operational Monitoring and Control - Operational

  • Merumuskan proyek-proyek peningkatan/optimalisasi operasional

  • Memberikan panduan dan keahlian untuk membantu site dalam menyusun rencana mitigasi yang sesuai

  • Mengembangkan strategi untuk memastikan optimalisasi armada di seluruh site dengan memanfaatkan artificial intelligence (AI) dan machine learning (ML), analitik data, serta best practices guna meningkatkan utilisasi fleet, efisiensi, dan produktivitas

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan: Minimal gelar Sarjana (S1)

  • Pengalaman: Pengalaman kerja minimal 5 tahun di industri pertambangan batubara atau mineral, dengan setidaknya 3 tahun pengalaman spesifik di Mining/Operations Control Center (MCC/OCC).

  • Sertifikasi: Memiliki sertifikasi kompetensi pengawas operasional pertambangan (POP/POM)

  • Keahlian Teknis:

    • Pengalaman mendalam menggunakan Fleet Management Systems (FMS) dan sistem dispatch (misalnya, Modular, Minestar, Wenco).

    • Kemampuan kuat dalam analisis data operasional dan penggunaan Business Intelligence Tools (Power BI, Tableau).

    • Pemahaman dasar hingga menengah tentang penerapan AI/ML dalam konteks operasional tambang.
title: Operations Control Center Senior Specialist

description: About CompanyAt Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. By combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their marke...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About Company

At Ennovi we harness the power of two megatrends - electrification and AI - to help industries innovate at speed, operate smarter, and achieve sustainable growth. By combining these transformative forces with our global reach and best talent, we empower our customers to lead their markets and drive sustainable progress.

From automotive to aerospace, consumer electronics, data storage, industrial, and medical markets, we help our customers achieve these megatrends by creating smarter, safer, and more sustainable solutions.​

We excel in developing high-performance, custom solutions that meet diverse technical needs, solve unique challenges, optimize performance, and adapt to evolving market demands.​

Our mission is to get customers to the future faster, from anywhere. Headquartered in Singapore, ENNOVI has a global presence across North America, Europe, SEA and China, where all its activities are socially responsible, with minimal environmental impact. Learn more at www.ennovi.com.


Why Join Us

At Ennovi, we envision a future of electrification and innovation and strive to create an inspiring workplace where our employees are integral to shaping that future. We offer a dynamic, collaborative and inclusive culture that encourages continuous learning, professional growth, and a sense of purpose. As a part of the Ennovi team, employees experience the excitement of being at the forefront of cutting-edge technologies and contributing to a sustainable future.

Our commitment to the transformation is epitomized by our five pillars: Speed, Innovation, Best Talent, Global Reach, and Sustainability. This entails navigating exponential market changes through agile structures, fostering innovation across all aspects of our business, strategically expanding our global footprint, championing sustainability initiatives and nurturing a winning team.

Privacy Policy

Ennovi is an equal opportunity employer in conformance with all applicable laws and regulations to individuals who are qualified to perform job requirements. The Company administers its personnel policies, programs, and practices in a non-discriminatory manner in all aspects of the employment relationship, including recruitment, hiring, work assignment, promotion, transfer, termination, wage and salary administration, and selection for training.

By applying to this job posting, you agree with and acknowledge our privacy policy.

 

Job Summary

We are seeking a [Automation Engineer] to join our team in the Industrial Business Segment.

We are looking for a hands-on Automation Engineer with solid experience in industrial machine vision systems to support, commission, troubleshoot, and optimize existing vision-based assembly and inspection stations integrated with PLC-controlled automation equipment.

This role is execution and production-support focused, not full system design.

About the Business Segment
Ennovi’s Industrial segment powers automation, robotics, and energy storage systems enabling OEMs to achieve AI-powered manufacturing for Industry 4.0.


Main Responsibilities

  • Configure, fine-tune, and support industrial vision cameras for inspection and code reading

  • Optimize lighting, focus, exposure, and inspection thresholds

  • Commission vision stations and support production ramp-up

  • Troubleshoot vision, PLC interface, and automation-related issues

  • Reduce false rejects and improve inspection stability

  • Interface vision systems with PLCs for triggering, pass/fail handling, and reject control

  • Support operators and maintenance teams with quick issue resolution


Qualifications & Skills

  • Diploma / Degree in Mechatronics, Electrical, Electronics, or Automation Engineering

  • 3–6 years hands-on experience with industrial vision systems in manufacturing

  • Experience with vision platforms such as Hikvision, Cognex, Keyence, Omron, Basler, Sick, etc.

  • Good understanding of lighting, optics, and image quality basics

  • PLC interfacing experience (Omron/Innovance/Keyence/Allen-Bradley / Siemens / Mitsubishi or equivalent)

  • Experience in Microsoft Visual studio

  • Experience in AGV system(SEER Robotics)

  • Strong troubleshooting and shop-floor support skills

  • Experience in Scara robots (Yamaha, EPSON)

  • 6 axis robots (Innovance, Yashkava, Nachi, ABB) path teaching, trouble shooting.


Work Environment

  • Manufacturing / production environment

  • Hands-on, shop-floor oriented role, Flexibility for maintenance and production support.
title: Automation Engineer

description: About the roleWe are seeking a skilled Risk Analytics & MIS professional to join our dynamic team at PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia. As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational effi...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking a skilled Risk Analytics & MIS professional to join our dynamic team at PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia. As a contract position, you will be responsible for providing strategic insights and analytical support to drive the company's risk management and operational efficiency. This is an excellent opportunity to contribute to the growth and success of our fintech organisation.

What you'll be doing

  1. Conduct in-depth risk analysis and develop tailored risk models to identify, assess, and mitigate potential risks

  2. Gather, analyse, and interpret complex data to generate comprehensive management information systems (MIS) reports

  3. Analyze and monitor month-to-month data trends from multiple data sources (SLIK, FDC, CBI, multiplatform, telco, KYC, etc.) to generate actionable insights and drive data-driven decisions in credit risk management

  4. Develop and test new feature engineering strategies for credit scoring models, focusing on improving predictive accuracy and model performance

  5. Conduct comprehensive evaluation and backtesting of features to ensure robustness, scalability, and alignment with business objectives in underwriting processes.

  6. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance decision-making processes and improve operational performance

  7. Develop and maintain advanced analytical tools and dashboards to provide real-time visibility into key business metrics using tools like Looker and BigQuery

  8. Stay abreast of industry trends, regulations, and best practices to ensure compliance and continuous improvement

  9. Provide strategic guidance and recommendations to senior management on risk management and operational strategies

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in risk analytics, financial analysis, or a related field

  2. Strong proficiency in data analysis, modelling with clean, readable coding style, and visualization tools (such as Python, SQL Power BI, Tableau)

  3. Strong knowledge of data science tools: Numpy, Pandas, or SciPy; expertise in at least one backend framework: Flask, Django, or Jupyter Notebook

  4. Proficiency in mainstream databases: MySQL, MongoDB, Hive SQL, or similar technologies

  5. Excellent problem-solving, critical thinking, and decision-making skills

  6. Proven track record of delivering impactful insights and driving operational improvements

  7. Working knowledge of financial regulations, risk management principles, and industry best practices

  8. Bachelor's degree in Finance, Economics, Statistics, Mathematic or a related quantitative field

What we offer

At PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia, we are committed to providing a rewarding and supportive work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer opportunities for professional development, collaborative work environment, and a range of benefits to promote work-life balance.

About us

PT. Kredit Utama Fintech Indonesia is a leading fintech company dedicated to driving innovation in the banking and financial services industry. With a focus on digital transformation and customer-centric solutions, we are revolutionising the way people and businesses access and manage their finances. Join our dynamic team and be a part of our exciting journey.

Apply now to become our next Risk Analytics & MIS professional!
title: Risk Analytics & MIS

jobDescriptionHtml:
Kami mencari Visual Storyteller yang mahir memanfaatkan teknologi Artificial Intelligence (AI) untuk menciptakan visual berkualitas tinggi dengan efisien bagi kebutuhan Digital & In-Store.

Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  • Visual Campaign Strategy: Menciptakan konsep visual high-conversion untuk Digital Marketing (Ads, Sosmed) dan Retail Offline.

  • AI-Integrated Workflow: Secara aktif memanfaatkan Generative AI tools (Midjourney, Firefly, dll) untuk efisiensi pembuatan aset, moodboard, dan retouching tanpa mengorbankan estetika.

  • Brand Guardian: Menjaga konsistensi identitas visual brand agar selalu terlihat premium, modern, dan profesional di seluruh kanal komunikasi.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pengalaman kerja min. 5 tahun sebagai Graphic Designer, WAJIB pengalaman di Retail Fashion.

  • Sangat mahir Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

  • Tech-Savvy: Wajib memiliki kemampuan/portofolio pemanfaatan AI Tools dalam desain.

  • Paham visual untuk performance marketing (iklan yang menjual).

  • Kreatif, detail, dan mampu bekerja dengan deadline ketat.

  • Penempatan : Jakarta Timur & Bekasi

description: The AI Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and implementing artificial intelligence solutions to enhance product capabilities, improve efficiency, and support data-driven decision-making. This role includes, but is not limited to, delivering a production-ready conversational chatbot p...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The AI Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and implementing artificial intelligence solutions to enhance product capabilities, improve efficiency, and support data-driven decision-making. This role includes, but is not limited to, delivering a production-ready conversational chatbot prototype and completing AI-related tasks relevant to the product domain. The assignment will assess practical skills in natural language processing (NLP), prompt and intent design, model selection and tuning, system integration, testing, and documentation.

Job Requirements :

  • Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.

  • Minimum 5 years of professional experience in AI development, with proven involvement in AI or chatbot-related projects.

  • Strong experience with NLP libraries and frameworks such as NLTK, spaCy, or Microsoft Bot Framework.

  • Solid understanding of chatbot development best practices, architecture, and design patterns.

  • Experience integrating AI solutions using RESTful APIs and webhooks.

  • Ability to perform model selection, tuning, testing, and optimization for production use.

  • Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git).

  • Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently as well as collaboratively within a team.

  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills.

  • Professional proficiency in English, both written and verbal.

  • Experience leading or mentoring team members is an advantage.
title: Senior AI Developer

description: Required skills and qualifications :• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Information Technology, or a related field • Minimum 5 years of experience in VAS, Telco, Digital Services, Fintech, or platformbased businesses • Strong hands-on experience in VAS sales and business development, includ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Required skills and qualifications :
• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Information Technology, or a related field
• Minimum 5 years of experience in VAS, Telco, Digital Services, Fintech, or platformbased businesses
• Strong hands-on experience in VAS sales and business development, including managing key accounts, leading commercial negotiations, and driving revenue growth.
• Proven track record in P&L ownership, sales pipeline management, and achieving revenue
targets.
• Solid understanding of VAS business models, monetization, pricing, and revenue-sharing
structures.
• Strong commercial, leadership, communication, and negotiation skills, with the ability to
work effectively in a fast-paced and growing environment.
• Data-driven, strategic thinker with good analytical skills.
• Excellent communication skills in English

Responsibilities :
1. Business & Strategy Ownership
• Define and execute the overall VAS business strategy aligned with the company’s vision
and growth targets.
• Manage and expand the VAS product portfolio, including telco-related services, digital
content, PPOB, enterprise VAS, and other digital solutions.
• Own full P&L responsibility for the VAS business, ensuring sustainable revenue growth
and profitability.
2. Sales & Revenue (VAS)
• Lead the VAS sales strategy and go-to-market execution.
• Manage and grow key accounts and strategic clients/partners.
• Lead commercial negotiations, including pricing, contract terms, and revenue-sharing
models.
• Set sales targets, manage pipelines, and ensure revenue achievement.
• Work closely with or build a VAS Sales / Business Development team as the business
scales.
3. Partnership & Ecosystem Development
• Build and maintain strategic partnerships with telco operators, aggregators, content
providers, enterprise clients, and ecosystem partners.
• Identify and pursue new partnership opportunities to expand the VAS business.
4. Cross-Functional & Operational Alignment
• Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Operations, Finance, and Compliance
teams to ensure successful service delivery.
• Work in alignment with the COO to ensure operational readiness and execution excellence
for VAS offerings.
5. Leadership & Reporting
• Lead, mentor, and develop the VAS team.
• Provide regular business performance reports and strategic insights to senior management.
title: Head of VAS (Value Added Service)

  • Content Agility: Memproduksi visual marketing dengan cepat merespons tren media sosial.

Kualifikasi:

  • Pengalaman kerja min. 5 tahun sebagai Graphic Designer, WAJIB pengalaman di Retail Fashion.

  • Sangat mahir Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign).

  • Tech-Savvy: Wajib memiliki kemampuan/portofolio pemanfaatan AI Tools dalam desain.

  • Paham visual untuk performance marketing (iklan yang menjual).

  • Kreatif, detail, dan mampu bekerja dengan deadline ketat.

  • Penempatan : Jakarta Timur & Bekasi
title: Senior Graphic Designer

description: Required skills and qualifications :• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Information Technology, or a related field • Minimum 5 years of experience in VAS, Telco, Digital Services, Fintech, or platformbased businesses • Strong hands-on experience in VAS sales and business development, includ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Required skills and qualifications :
• Bachelor’s degree in Business, Management, Information Technology, or a related field
• Minimum 5 years of experience in VAS, Telco, Digital Services, Fintech, or platformbased businesses
• Strong hands-on experience in VAS sales and business development, including managing key accounts, leading commercial negotiations, and driving revenue growth.
• Proven track record in P&L ownership, sales pipeline management, and achieving revenue
targets.
• Solid understanding of VAS business models, monetization, pricing, and revenue-sharing
structures.
• Strong commercial, leadership, communication, and negotiation skills, with the ability to
work effectively in a fast-paced and growing environment.
• Data-driven, strategic thinker with good analytical skills.
• Excellent communication skills in English

Responsibilities :
1. Business & Strategy Ownership
• Define and execute the overall VAS business strategy aligned with the company’s vision
and growth targets.
• Manage and expand the VAS product portfolio, including telco-related services, digital
content, PPOB, enterprise VAS, and other digital solutions.
• Own full P&L responsibility for the VAS business, ensuring sustainable revenue growth
and profitability.
2. Sales & Revenue (VAS)
• Lead the VAS sales strategy and go-to-market execution.
• Manage and grow key accounts and strategic clients/partners.
• Lead commercial negotiations, including pricing, contract terms, and revenue-sharing
models.
• Set sales targets, manage pipelines, and ensure revenue achievement.
• Work closely with or build a VAS Sales / Business Development team as the business
scales.
3. Partnership & Ecosystem Development
• Build and maintain strategic partnerships with telco operators, aggregators, content
providers, enterprise clients, and ecosystem partners.
• Identify and pursue new partnership opportunities to expand the VAS business.
4. Cross-Functional & Operational Alignment
• Collaborate closely with Technology, Product, Operations, Finance, and Compliance
teams to ensure successful service delivery.
• Work in alignment with the COO to ensure operational readiness and execution excellence
for VAS offerings.
5. Leadership & Reporting
• Lead, mentor, and develop the VAS team.
• Provide regular business performance reports and strategic insights to senior management.
title: Head of VAS (Value Added Service)

description: YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES WILL INCLUDE:Responsible for the creation & maintenance of all CS related data automation routines using existing and future automation tools/methodologies for all supported production methods.Create and maintain internal process documents.Understand customer needs and provide ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES WILL INCLUDE:

  • Responsible for the creation & maintenance of all CS related data automation routines using existing and future automation tools/methodologies for all supported production methods.

  • Create and maintain internal process documents.

  • Understand customer needs and provide timely response to customer request.

  • Coordinate with sales team, other departments and production on delivery of goods and services.

  • Handle customer complaints according to the Company procedures and services standard, able to suggest corrective actions to drive cross departments for service improvement

  • Communicate with customers and vendors regarding the latest development of the customers to maintain updated customer profile information.

  • Proactively share among team members on new product/system knowledge/process improvement.

  • Provide suggestions to the supervisor on the improvement of the current order / operation flow to increase efficiency.

  • Be proactive and self-aware.

  • Provide selling support to respond to management needs

  • Manage accounts in terms of order processing, order follow up, pricing integrity, on-time deliveries, complete order fulfillment

  • Authorizes credit memos/refunds within policy and according to established procedures.

  • Champion customer needs and follow up on customer inquiries

  • Provide responsive order management support including order entry, or expediting and shipment information to customers

WHAT WE WILL BE LOOKING FOR IN YOU:

  • Bachelor’s Degree required.

  • Strong communication skills.

  • Problem solving skills

  • Lean/Process Excellence, Digital and Automation Mindset, Data & Analytical

  • English skills – advanced reading speaking

  • Understanding of applicable computer systems, such as Microsoft Office, Lotus Notes, Google applications especially Google sheet/Excel and function specific software (Macro, VBA,...)

  • 1-3 years experience in the apparel industry preferred

  • Focus on customers & market

  • Drive action & execution

  • Collaborate across boundaries
title: Automation Developer

jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal S2 Ilmu Komputer atau bidang terkait (Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, atau Computer Engineering).

  • Memiliki pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun di industri IT, khususnya yang berkaitan dengan pengembangan sistem berbasis AI atau data analytics.

  • Memahami konsep dan penerapan Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, serta teknologi pendukung seperti Python, TensorFlow, dan PyTorch.

  • Memiliki kemampuan mengajar, komunikasi, dan presentasi yang baik.

  • Mampu bekerja sama dalam tim serta aktif dalam kegiatan akademik dan organisasi kampus.

  • Memiliki etos kerja yang tinggi, integritas, dan semangat membangun karakter mahasiswa sesuai nilai-nilai ESQ.


Tanggung Jawab:

  • Melaksanakan Tridharma Perguruan Tinggi (Pendidikan, Penelitian, dan Pengabdian kepada Masyarakat).

  • Menyiapkan, menyusun, dan menyampaikan materi perkuliahan di bidang Ilmu Komputer, dengan fokus pada Artificial Intelligence dan bidang terkait seperti:

    • Pemrograman berbasis Python

    • Algoritma dan Struktur Data

    • Machine Learning & Deep Learning

    • Data Mining dan Big Data Analytics

    • Desain dan Analisis Sistem Cerdas

  • Melakukan bimbingan akademik dan penelitian kepada mahasiswa.

  • Melaksanakan administrasi akademik, termasuk penilaian, dokumentasi kegiatan belajar, dan laporan akademik.

  • Mengembangkan penelitian dan publikasi ilmiah di bidang AI dan teknologi digital.

  • Berpartisipasi aktif dalam kegiatan Universitas Ary Ginanjar dan ESQ Corps, termasuk pelatihan karakter, seminar, dan program pengembangan kampus.

  • Berkontribusi dalam pengembangan kurikulum dan inovasi pembelajaran digital.

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 di bidang Information Systems, Data Science, Mathematics, atau Engineering.

  • Memahami Dashboard, KPI, Business Process, dan dasar-dasar Programming.

  • Menguasai Dashboard Development, SQL, Programming, serta Reporting.

  • Memiliki kompetensi menggunakan Power BI / Tableau / Superset / Qlik.

  • Menguasai salah satu bahasa pemrograman seperti Python / Java / JavaScript.

  • Menguasai SQL (wajib).

jobDescriptionHtml:
Key Responsibilities :

  • Strong analytical thinking with the ability to translate data into clear insights and recommendations

  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills

  • Knowledge of the education industry in Indonesia is an advantage

  • Having a Responsible to Life attitude

description: We are looking for a Business Intelligence Coordinator who is passionate about transforming data into meaningful business insights. If you enjoy working with numbers, trends, and strategic decision-making, this role is for you.Key Responsibilities:Collect, organize, and maintain marketing and sales ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are looking for a Business Intelligence Coordinator who is passionate about transforming data into meaningful business insights. If you enjoy working with numbers, trends, and strategic decision-making, this role is for you.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Collect, organize, and maintain marketing and sales data from various internal and external sources.

  2. Analyze sales and marketing performance by area, product, achievement, and growth trends.

  3. Prepare reports and dashboards to support management decision-making.

  4. Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and reliability across all marketing databases.

  5. Collaborate with marketing and sales teams to identify opportunities for improvement and growth.


Qualifications:

  1. Bachelor’s degree in Statistics.

  2. At least 3 years of experience in a marketing data analysis role, with prior experience in a coordinator or supervisory position considered a strong advantage.

  3. Strong expertise in data processing, analysis, and sales data management.

  4. Proven ability to collect, organize, and maintain marketing data from multiple sources with high accuracy.

  5. Skilled in analyzing marketing and sales data by region, product, performance, and growth trends.

  6. Proficient in using data analysis tools such as Excel, SQL, Tableau, and Google Analytics to generate actionable insights.

  7. Willing to be based in Surabaya, East Java.
title: Business Intelligence Coordinator

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:

  • Developing and managing business intelligence solutions for the organization

  • Develop and execute database queries and conduct analyses

  • Generate reports, dashboards, and visualizations to present findings to stakeholders and support data-driven decision-making


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Information Systems, Computer Science, or a related field.

  • At least 2 years of experience in Business Intelligence.

  • Proficient with BI tools, particularly Power BI.

  • Experience with Azure Data Factory, Snowflake, and Python.

  • Strong understanding of data engineering, ETL processes, and data warehousing.

  • Hands-on experience with SSIS, MS SQL, and stored procedures.

  • Skilled in data migration across various sources.

  • Familiarity with SAP CPI, SNPGlue, and BizTalk are preferred.

  • Proven experience in programming and managing data transfers between systems or organizations.


Why join Us?

  • We offer very attractive salary and outstanding benefits.

  • Most of our clients are multinational company which you will be exposed to a large IT environment and valuable experience in international scale projects.

  • You will always learn new things as our projects always adopt latest technology and best practice available in the market.

  • Last but not least, we offer a supportive and encouraging environment that puts the emphasis on teamwork. Here, your soft skill (professional relationships, character, attitude) will grow as fast as your technical skill.

description: Job Description:Data & Insights:Gather, consolidate, and analyze seller and market data to identify growth opportunities.Conduct competitor and industry benchmarking to inform strategy.Initiative Executions & Analysis:Actively collaborate with stakeholders from cross-divisions and cross-business uni...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description:

Data & Insights:

  • Gather, consolidate, and analyze seller and market data to identify growth opportunities.

  • Conduct competitor and industry benchmarking to inform strategy.

Initiative Executions & Analysis:

  • Actively collaborate with stakeholders from cross-divisions and cross-business units to design and implement growth programs.

  • End-to-end program management (incl. support pilot tests, track performance, and conduct post-mortem analysis) ensuring the successful execution of initiatives and their alignment with broader business goals.

  • Problem-solving through comprehensive investigation, analysis, and solution design, while continually monitoring and reporting on key issues affecting business growth.

Seller Engagement & Communication:

  • Develop clear, seller-friendly communication materials (guides, FAQs, tutorials) with relevant teams.

  • Ensure sellers understand and adopt new features, programs, and policies.

  • Collect feedback from sellers and incorporate it into program improvements.

Continuous Improvement:

  • Share best practices and learnings across the team.

  • Contribute to building scalable frameworks for team growth.

Requirements:

  • Previous working experience in a strategy/management consulting / startup / e-commerce role is preferred

  • Strong analytical skills and critical thinking - able to breakdown problem statements into sub-tasks and actionable items, strong at analyzing and interpreting data into business insights

  • High ownership - highly self-driven, proactive in finding growth opportunities, and committed to find effective solutions to problems

  • Structured verbal and written communication - including good powerpoint and excel skills, able to present to management team

  • Be able to work both as individual contributor as well as team player
title: Business Growth - Business Development

  • Problem-solving through comprehensive investigation, analysis, and solution design, while continually monitoring and reporting on key issues affecting business growth.

Seller Engagement & Communication:

  • Develop clear, seller-friendly communication materials (guides, FAQs, tutorials) with relevant teams.

  • Ensure sellers understand and adopt new features, programs, and policies.

  • Collect feedback from sellers and incorporate it into program improvements.

Continuous Improvement:

  • Share best practices and learnings across the team.

  • Contribute to building scalable frameworks for team growth.

Requirements:

  • Previous working experience in a strategy/management consulting / startup / e-commerce role is preferred

  • Strong analytical skills and critical thinking - able to breakdown problem statements into sub-tasks and actionable items, strong at analyzing and interpreting data into business insights

  • High ownership - highly self-driven, proactive in finding growth opportunities, and committed to find effective solutions to problems

  • Structured verbal and written communication - including good powerpoint and excel skills, able to present to management team

  • Be able to work both as individual contributor as well as team player
title: Business Growth - Business Development

  • Mengelola dan mengembangkan sistem yang berkaitan dengan pemrosesan data.

  • Membantu mengelola dan mengembangkan aplikasi, baik berbasis desktop maupun web, untuk menunjang pengelolaan proses bisnis perusahaan.

  • Memelihara dan memonitor infrastruktur data seperti database, data warehouse, dan sistem pemrosesan data berskala besar sesuai kebutuhan perusahaan.

  • Pengalaman kerja minimal 1 tahun pada posisi setara (Fresh Graduate atau Tanpa Pengalaman juga dipertimbangkan).

  • Mampu mengoperasikan MS. Office (Word, Excel, Power Point).

  • Memiliki pengalaman atau pemahaman dalam pengembangan sistem atau pemberian technical support untuk sistem ERP.

  • Pengalaman menggunakan atau menangani Sistem WMS (Warehouse Management System) menjadi nilai tambah

    • Database Management Systems

    • Software Testing

    • System Design
