description: Job Description1. Operational Monitoring & Data ControlExtract, process, and analyze store operational data from the Nimbly applicatiEnsure all stores complete Nimbly reports consistently, fully, and in accordance with company standards.Monitor store KPI performance based on Nimbly data and identify...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

1. Operational Monitoring & Data Control

  • Extract, process, and analyze store operational data from the Nimbly applicati

  • Ensure all stores complete Nimbly reports consistently, fully, and in accordance with company standards.

  • Monitor store KPI performance based on Nimbly data and identify underperforming stores.

  • Identify gaps, findings, and data anomalies in store operations.

2. Compliance & SOP Audit

  • Analyze store compliance with operational SOPs based on Nimbly reports.

  • Cross-check operational discipline data against attendance data from Talenta.

  • Identify inconsistencies between reported operational data and actual store conditions.

  • Prepare summaries of findings and potential operational risks.

3. Issue Tracking & Reporting

  • Monitor and manage issues reported by stores through the Nimbly application.

  • Categorize issues by type (SOP, manpower, operations, discipline, etc.).

  • Prepare periodic analytical reports for submission to the Data Analyst and related teams.

  • Provide supporting data for internal audit and operational evaluations.

4. Data Support & Continuous Improvement

  • Provide data support to the Data Analyst related to store operational data.

  • Deliver data-driven insights regarding recurring violations, non-compliance trends, and operational risk areas.

  • Support the development and improvement of monitoring and reporting systems to enhance effectiveness.


Job Requirements

Education & Experience

  • Minimum Diploma (D3) or Bachelor’s Degree (S1) in any major
    (preferred: Statistics, Management, Information Systems, Accounting, or Operations).

  • 1–3 years of experience in Data monitoring / operational control / Internal audit / compliance / quality control / Operational support / reporting

Technical Skills

  • Strong ability to process and interpret data (Excel / Google Sheets is mandatory).

  • Accustomed to handling daily operational data.

  • Able to extract insights from unstructured or inconsistent data.

  • Experience using HRIS or operational applications (Talenta, Nimbly, etc.) is an advantage but not mandatory.

Personality & Mindset (Key Requirements)

  • Highly detail-oriented and meticulous.

  • Possesses an auditor mindset: critical, analytical, and comfortable identifying discrepancies.

  • Firm with standards and not easily influenced by operational excuses.

  • Mentally resilient and consistent in control and monitoring responsibilities.
title: Operational Compliance & Data Monitoring Officer

description: Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.Job Responsibilities:Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data,...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Growth opportunities: progression path from 7×24 Asset Administrator → 5×8 Asset Administrator → Asset Manager.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Assist in managing data center warehouse assets, including inbound and outbound inventory handling.

  • Maintain accurate asset records, ensure timely updates of stock data, and support audit requirements.

  • Handle basic hardware equipment (e.g. servers, network devices) — asset tagging, inspection, and reporting.

  • Coordinate with internal teams on asset movement, delivery, and return processes.

  • Support the asset manager in daily warehouse operations and documentation.

  • Participate in 24/7 shift rotation and on-call support schedule as required.

  • Participate in continuous learning and skill development related to IT hardware and asset management.

Basic Job Requirement:

  • Responsible and detail-oriented, with strong organizational skills.

  • Open to fresh graduates; candidates without a degree but with strong work ethic and potential are also encouraged to apply.

  • Diverse educational backgrounds are welcome — IT-related majors are preferred.

description: Gambaran Umum PekerjaanPT Unicom Harbura Jaya Makmur, perusahaan teknologi inovatif yang berbasis di Jakarta, membutuhkan seorang Data Analyst yang berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menginterpretas...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Gambaran Umum Pekerjaan
PT Unicom Harbura Jaya Makmur, perusahaan teknologi inovatif yang berbasis di Jakarta, membutuhkan seorang Data Analyst yang berdedikasi untuk bergabung dengan tim kami. Sebagai Data Analyst, Anda akan memainkan peran kunci dalam mengumpulkan, menganalisis, dan menginterpretasikan data yang krusial untuk mendukung pengambilan keputusan strategis perusahaan. Posisi ini menawarkan kesempatan untuk bekerja di lingkungan yang dinamis dan menarik di bidang teknologi informasi dan komunikasi.

Kami membuka kesempatan bagi Anda yang teliti, komunikatif, dan bersemangat untuk bergabung sebagai Admin Tracking. Posisi ini bertanggung jawab untuk memonitor, merekap, dan memastikan kelancaran proses pelaporan dan progres kegiatan di perusahaan.

Tanggung Jawab Utama

  • Memantau dan mencatat perkembangan tugas, proyek, atau dokumen yang sedang berjalan.

  • Membuat rekap data progress secara berkala (harian/mingguan/bulanan).

  • Berkoordinasi dengan berbagai departemen untuk memastikan semua target dan deadline tercapai.

  • Menginput, memperbarui, dan menjaga akurasi data di sistem tracking internal.

  • Menyusun laporan status kegiatan untuk manajemen.

  • Menangani kendala terkait keterlambatan atau hambatan proses secara cepat dan tepat

  • Berpikir kritis, analitis, dan tidak mudah menyerah

  • Mau terus belajar hal baru dan cepat beradaptasi

  • Mampu bekerja dengan deadline ketat dan tetap menjaga kualitas

Kualifikasi

  • Pendidikan minimal SMA/SMK sederajat (D3/S1 lebih disukai).

  • Berpengalaman di bidang administrasi, data entry, atau project tracking menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Mampu berkomunikasi dengan lancar, baik lisan maupun tulisan.

  • Mahir menggunakan Microsoft Office (terutama Excel) dan sistem administrasi berbasis online.

  • Teliti, detail-oriented, dan mampu bekerja di bawah tekanan.

  • Memiliki kemampuan koordinasi dan problem solving yang baik.


Jika Anda tertarik untuk bergabung dengan tim kami yang dinamis, lamar sekarang dan jadilah bagian dari pertumbuhan kami!
title: ADMIN TRACKING

jobDescriptionHtml:
Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  1. Menganalisis data penjualan, market, dan customer untuk menghasilkan insight terkait strategi penjualan dan operasional toko.

  2. Menyusun laporan rutin, ad-hoc, serta dashboard performa bisnis menggunakan Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, atau tools analitik terkait.

  3. Mengembangkan dan mengelola automation sederhana untuk meningkatkan efisiensi pengolahan dan analisis data.

  4. Memberikan rekomendasi berbasis data untuk mendukung pengembangan strategi penjualan dan peningkatan performa bisnis.

  5. Mendukung analisis kebutuhan pelatihan dan pengembangan karyawan berbasis performa dan data operasional.


Keterampilan, Kualifikasi, dan Pengalaman yang Dibutuhkan:

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibilities:
- Execute and monitor daily operational transactions in accordance with internal procedures and applicable regulations
- Ensure all activities are completed accurately, on time, and in line with company standards
- Monitor system activities and operational flows, and escalate irregularities or issues promptly
- Maintain accurate records, logs, and reports for internal control, audit, and compliance purposes
- Coordinate closely with Risk, Compliance, and Operations teams to ensure adherence to policies and limits
- Support internal and external reporting requirements, including responding to data or information requests
- Handle operational inquiries, corrections, and issue resolution in a professional and timely manner
- Maintain strict confidentiality of company and client information
- Support business growth by ensuring operational readiness, system stability, and process continuity
- Participate in periodic reviews and improvements of procedures to align with regulatory or business changes

Requirements:
- Minimum Diploma/Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Business, Economics, or a related field (Fresh graduate are welcome to apply)
- Experience in operations, execution, or control functions within a regulated or fast-paced environment
- Good understanding of operational workflows, internal controls, and compliance processes
- Detail-oriented, disciplined, and able to work under pressure
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with high attention to accuracy
- Proficient in Microsoft Office, especially Excel, for reporting and reconciliation (LookUp function, Pivot, Power Query)
- Able to work independently and collaborate effectively across teams
- High integrity, professionalism, and strong sense of responsibility

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description

Administrasi Penjualan

  • Membuat dan memproses dokumen penjualan (quotation, sales order, invoice, delivery order).

  • Memastikan kelengkapan dan keakuratan data transaksi penjualan.

  • Mengarsipkan dokumen penjualan secara rapi dan sistematis (fisik & digital).

Pengelolaan Data & Laporan

  • Menginput data penjualan ke sistem dan excel

  • Menyusun laporan penjualan harian, mingguan, dan bulanan.

  • Membantu monitoring pencapaian target sales dari sisi administrasi.

Koordinasi Internal

  • Menjadi penghubung antara tim sales dengan gudang, finance, dan operasional.

Customer Administration

  • Menangani pertanyaan administratif dari customer (status order, invoice, dokumen).

Kualifikasi

  • Minimal D3/S1

  • Pengalaman minimal 3 tahun sebagai Sales Admin / Sales Support / Admin Penjualan (lebih disukai di bidang penjualan alat berat)

  • Teliti, rapi, dan terbiasa bekerja dengan data serta dokumen

  • Mampu mengelola arsip fisik dan digital dengan baik.

  • Mampu bekerja secara mandiri maupun dalam tim.

  • Bisa berbahasa Inggris merupakan nilai tambah

  • Domisili Kabupaten Tangerang

description: Role: IT Operations EngineerLocation: JakartaPosition Type: Full-time Reports to: CTOAbout the RoleThis role is responsible for the day-to-day technology operations of AMEs Jakarta office.The role formally reports to AME’s CTO, ensuring alignment with overall strategy, security, and infrastructure s...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Role: IT Operations Engineer

Location: Jakarta

Position Type: Full-time Reports to: CTO


About the Role

This role is responsible for the day-to-day technology operations of AMEs Jakarta office.

The role formally reports to AME’s CTO, ensuring alignment with overall strategy, security, and infrastructure standards. Day-to-day effectiveness will be via close collaboration with the Jakarta Office Manager and senior analysts, ensuring local operational issues are surfaced early and addressed in a way that supports productivity.

A key responsibility of this role is the execution and verification of application deployments through established CI/CD pipelines, including confirming build success, validating deployments, and coordinating fixes with developers when deployments fail or introduce regressions.

The role also acts as a central communication point between local users and the broader international technology team, responsible for logging issues and bugs with sufficient technical detail. This includes assisting users in reproducing issues, collecting logs and diagnostics, capturing browser errors, and ensuring escalations are actionable for infrastructure and development teams.

It will also entail, working closely with the current infrastructure lead to assist with debugging local networking and internet issues.

While not a software development role, it requires enough technical depth across infrastructure, applications, and deployment workflows to diagnose issues, perform safe operational actions, and communicate clearly across technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Key Responsibilities

  • Coordinate and execute application deployments to IIS servers, confirming successful rollout and post-deployment validation/testing.

  • Collaborate closely with the existing deployment specialist to maintain deployment consistency and support rollback or hotfix scenarios.

  • Monitor application and server health, proactively identify issues, and perform first-line response to outages (service restarts, diagnostics, escalation).

  • Work with developers to refine CI/CD processes, helping improve reliability, rollback capability, and observability.

  • Prepare and validate test environments for Windows Server 2025, ensuring application compatibility and readiness for migration.

  • Work with developers and infrastructure teams to troubleshoot performance or configuration issues.

  • Maintain documentation, deployment runbooks, and recovery procedures.

  • Support office manager with managing local technology vendors such as ISPs and hardware vendors.

Qualifications

  • 5+ years of experience in application operations, DevOps, or system administration roles.

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer information systems, computer science, engineering or related field


Technical Skills:

  • Windows Server (2019/2025) administration, including roles, services, and patching.

  • IIS configuration and management (app pools, bindings, SSL certificates, sites).

  • Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, or equivalent).

  • Understanding of monitoring and logging (Event Viewer, Performance Monitor etc.)

  • Windows Server administration (2019 or newer).

  • Solid understanding of networking fundamentals, service dependencies, and DNS/configuration for web apps.

Nice to Have:

  • Prior involvement in Windows Server upgrades or migrations (e.g. 2016 to 2019).

  • Understanding of reverse proxies, load balancing, and/or certificate management.

  • Experience designing and/or implementing blue-green or canary deployment strategies.

  • Relevant Microsoft Certifications would be well regarded.

Soft Skills

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset

  • Clear communication of technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders

  • Attention to detail and data accuracy

  • Proactive approach to monitoring

  • Growth mindset & willingness to learn

What We Offer

  • Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities

  • Competitive salary
title: IT Operations Engineer

description: Jackson Ventures is a San Francisco–based company focused on identifying, evaluating, and executing high-potential new venture opportunities globally. Our work spans venture investing, strategic partnerships, and selective acquisitions across multiple industries. We are seeking a Business Analyst wh...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Jackson Ventures is a San Francisco–based company focused on identifying, evaluating, and executing high-potential new venture opportunities globally. Our work spans venture investing, strategic partnerships, and selective acquisitions across multiple industries. We are seeking a Business Analyst who is analytical, detail-oriented, and eager to support research, analysis, and decision-making across our venture and investment activities.

What You Will Do

Responsibilities:

  • Conduct market research, business analysis, and financial analysis for potential ventures and investments

  • Analyze business models, market size, competitive landscape, and growth opportunities

  • Review and assess business plans and proposals to evaluate viability, scalability, and strategic fit

  • Prepare analysis reports, presentations, and supporting materials for internal decision-making

  • Work closely with internal teams, investors, and external partners to support business development, market research, and M&A initiatives

  • Contribute independent, value-added insights to strategic and investment discussions

  • Support internal review and investment committee meetings

  • Build relationships within startup, venture, and founder ecosystems to help source potential opportunities

  • Support and help monitor existing Jackson Ventures portfolio companies

  • Perform other related duties as assigned

Minimum Experience and Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Business, Economics, Finance, Accounting, Mathematics, Engineering, or a related field

  • Background or exposure to finance, engineering, computer science, or related disciplines (Fresh graduates are welcome to apply)

  • Strong analytical skills, including the ability to interpret financial and operational data

  • Comfortable working with spreadsheets, presentations, and basic financial models

  • Self-motivated, detail-oriented, and able to multitask in a fast-paced environment

  • Strong communication and interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate across teams

  • Ability to work under deadlines with quick turnaround

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Description : 

  1. System Assessment existing network infrastructure at customer

  2. Plan, implement, install, operate and maintain hardware system, network infrastructure system

  3. Preventive Maintenance, Corrective Maintenance and Monitoring network infrastructure devices such as Core Switch, Distribution Switch, Access Switch, Router, Wireless Controller, Access Point

  4. Proof of Concept (POC) network infrastructure devices

  5. Troubleshooting hardware and software network infrastructure devices

  6. Create report for Preventive Maintenance and Corrective Maintenance for customers

  7. Presentation Report Preventive Maintenance and Corrective Maintenance to Customer

Qualifications :

  1. Bachelor’s degree / Diploma degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field

  2. At least 2 years of working experience as L2 Network Engineer, Fresh Graduate are welcome to apply

  3. Have knowledge of networking (TCP/IP, OSI Layer, Routing, Switching, Wireless)

  4. Have experience on Cisco, Aruba, Ruckus, Unifi, Mikrotik, Sangfor

  5. Have experience on network monitoring system such as Dude, Zabbix, Libre, Grafana

  6. Have experience on wireless network assessment heatmaps is a plus

  7. Have Certification about CCNA/CCNP, MTCNA is a plus

  8. Strong troubleshooting skills and responsible for problem solving

  9. Good verbal and written communication skills (English and Bahasa)

  10. Able to work occasional overtime during the week and on weekends when required

  11. Good attitude, discipline, honest, fast-learner, self-motivated, and team player

  12. Willing to do business trip

  13. Work location in Jakarta

  2. Plan, implement, install, operate and maintain hardware system, network infrastructure system

  3. Preventive Maintenance, Corrective Maintenance and Monitoring network infrastructure devices such as Core Switch, Distribution Switch, Access Switch, Router, Wireless Controller, Access Point

  4. Proof of Concept (POC) network infrastructure devices

  5. Troubleshooting hardware and software network infrastructure devices

  6. Create report for Preventive Maintenance and Corrective Maintenance for customers

  7. Presentation Report Preventive Maintenance and Corrective Maintenance to Customer

Qualifications :

  1. Bachelor’s degree / Diploma degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field

  2. At least 2 years of working experience as L2 Network Engineer, Fresh Graduate are welcome to apply

  3. Have knowledge of networking (TCP/IP, OSI Layer, Routing, Switching, Wireless)

  4. Have experience on Cisco, Aruba, Ruckus, Unifi, Mikrotik, Sangfor

  5. Have experience on network monitoring system such as Dude, Zabbix, Libre, Grafana

  6. Have experience on wireless network assessment heatmaps is a plus

  7. Have Certification about CCNA/CCNP, MTCNA is a plus

  8. Strong troubleshooting skills and responsible for problem solving

  9. Good verbal and written communication skills (English and Bahasa)

  10. Able to work occasional overtime during the week and on weekends when required

  11. Good attitude, discipline, honest, fast-learner, self-motivated, and team player

  12. Willing to do business trip

  13. Work location in Jakarta
title: NETWORK ENGINEER

description: We are a public listed company engaged in trading and manufacturing, with branch offices across Indonesia. To support our nationwide operations, we utilize an ERP system as the backbone of our business processes.We are looking for a dynamic and experienced IT Supervisor to manage, secure, and contin...
jobDescriptionHtml:
We are a public listed company engaged in trading and manufacturing, with branch offices across Indonesia. To support our nationwide operations, we utilize an ERP system as the backbone of our business processes.

We are looking for a dynamic and experienced IT Supervisor to manage, secure, and continuously improve our IT systems and applications. Therefore, we are seeking high-calibre candidates to fill the following position.


Responsibilities:

  • Manage and supervise daily IT operations, including infrastructure, servers, databases, applications, and networks.

  • Ensure smooth operation and continuous improvement of the ERP system across all departments.

  • Develop, maintain, and enhance internal IT applications based on business needs.

  • Oversee IT programming and application development (custom modules, integrations, reports, and automation).

  • Establish and enforce IT policies related to security, data protection, backup, and disaster recovery.

  • Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and provide solutions for head office and branch offices.

  • Coordinate with ERP vendors and external IT partners for system support and development.

  • Provide training and technical support to ERP users and internal application users.

  • Lead IT projects such as system upgrades, application development, and data migration.

  • Prepare regular IT reports and recommend improvements to management.


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree (S1) or Diploma (D3/D4) from a recognized university or vocational institution, majoring in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field.

  • Minimum 4 years of experience in IT, with at least 2–3 years in a supervisory or leadership role.

  • Proven experience in ERP implementation and management, such as:
    SAP, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, Sage 300 ERP, Odoo, or similar systems.

  • Strong capability in IT programming and application development, including:

    • Web or application development (PHP, .NET, Java, Python, or similar)

    • Database development (SQL, stored procedures, reporting)

    • System integration and API usage

  • Solid understanding of IT infrastructure, networking (LAN/WAN, VPN), servers, databases, and cloud environments.

  • Good knowledge of cybersecurity, data protection, and IT governance.

  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills.

  • Able to work independently and effectively lead a team.

  • Willing to travel to branch offices across Indonesia.

jobDescriptionHtml:
JOB DESCRIPTION :

  • Monitor and maintain the Autogate system, including workstations, sensors, gates, cameras, and related infrastructure. Make an initial clarification and forward matters requiring system-level action to designated personnel

  • Provide first-level technical support to users and stakeholders for Autogate issues.

  • Monitor equipment status and operational autogate system, e.g troubleshoot and resolve hardware faults in the Autogate system in a timely.

  • Maintain operational records of document incidents, troubleshooting steps, and solutions in a knowledge base or ticketing system.


REQUIREMENT :

  • Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science or related field with min. GPA 3.00

  • At least 1–3 years of experience in IT support, preferably with exposure to access control or automation systems (e.g., Autogate, barrier gates, RFID, CCTV)

  • Knowledge of hardware maintenance and basic electronics related to gate automation systems.

  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

  • Good communication skills to work with cross-functional teams.

  • Willingness to work on-site and perform standby/on-call duties if required.

  • Self-motivated with the ability to work independently under minimal supervision.

description: About the roleWe are seeking an experienced IT Support professional to join our growing team at PT, Entek Separindo Asia' in Cileungsi, Jawa Barat. As an IT Support specialist, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and resolving IT-related issues for our employees, ensuring the ...
jobDescriptionHtml:
About the role

We are seeking an experienced IT Support professional to join our growing team at PT, Entek Separindo Asia' in Cileungsi, Jawa Barat. As an IT Support specialist, you will be responsible for providing technical assistance and resolving IT-related issues for our employees, ensuring the smooth operation of our technology infrastructure.

MANDATORY :

  1. Windows Server (Domain Controller).

  2. Microsoft client OS (Win. 11 Pro).

  3. Basic Networking.

  4. Backup Server.

SKILL

  1. If possible, have experience with Dell servers.

  1. Print Server.

  2. CCTV.

  3. KVM.

  4. UPS APC

What you'll be doing

  1. Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network-related problems for our users

  2. Provide first-line support and act as the primary point of contact for all IT-related inquiries

  3. Maintain and manage the company's IT systems, including servers, workstations, and peripheral devices

  4. Implement and maintain security measures to protect our IT infrastructure

  5. Assist with the installation, configuration, and testing of new hardware and software

  6. Document IT-related procedures and maintain accurate records of all support activities

  7. Collaborate with other IT team members to ensure the successful delivery of IT service

What we're looking for

  1. Minimum 2 years of experience in an IT support role, preferably in a similar industry

  2. Strong technical skills in hardware and software troubleshooting, network administration, and basic programming

  3. Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills to quickly identify and resolve IT-related issues

  4. Customer-focused approach with the ability to communicate technical information effectively to non-technical users

  5. Strong time management and multitasking abilities to handle multiple support requests simultaneously

  6. Familiarity with common IT support tools and software, such as ticketing systems, remote access tools, and monitoring software

  7. Diploma or degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field

What we offer

At PT, Entek Separindo Asia', we are committed to providing our employees with a supportive and rewarding work environment. In addition to a competitive salary, we offer a range of benefits, including:

  1. Comprehensive health insurance coverage

  2. Opportunities for career development and training

  3. Flexible work arrangements and work-life balance initiatives

  4. Team-building events and social activities

About us

PT, Entek Separindo Asia' is a leading provider of IT solutions and services in the region. With a strong focus on innovation and customer satisfaction, we have built a reputation for delivering reliable and tailored IT support to our clients. Our diverse team of professionals is committed to driving the success of our customers and contributing to the growth of the IT industry.

If you are passionate about technology and eager to be part of a dynamic and supportive team, we encourage you to apply for this exciting IT Support role at PT, Entek Separindo Asia'. Please submit your resume and cover letter now.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • Must hold CCNA/CCNP, CompTIA Network+, or equivalent.

  • Minimum 3 years in network engineering.

  • Strong proficiency in configuration and troubleshooting (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, VPN), routing protocols (OSPF, EIGRP), VoIP, and QoS.

  • Familiarity with firewalls and security appliances, as well as network monitoring tools (e.g., Nagios, SolarWinds).

  • Knowledge of SD-WAN, network automation tools, and experience with cloud networking (AWS, Azure).

  • Proven ability in problem-solving, documentation, and communication.

Responsibilities:

  • Design and deploy LAN/WAN, Wi-Fi, and VPN solutions.

  • Configure and maintain network devices (routers, switches, firewalls).

  • Monitor network performance and troubleshoot issues.

  • Implement network security measures and compliance standards.

  • Support disaster recovery and redundancy planning.

  • Collaborate with IT teams for infrastructure upgrades and migrations.

description: The Senior IT Manager is responsible for supporting all functions related to Information Technology. This includes leading and managing the implementation of all IT initiatives to support the department's needs, including but not limited to Systems, Network management and security, Servers, and Infr...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Senior IT Manager is responsible for supporting all functions related to Information Technology. This includes leading and managing the implementation of all IT initiatives to support the department's needs, including but not limited to Systems, Network management and security, Servers, and Infrastructure, maintaining and updating IT policies and procedures, creating IT training and working with the training staff, Risk Management, Incident Response/Recovery, and Compliance.


Senior Information Technology Manager Responsibilities:

  • Oversees IT security to prevent and respond to potential breaches or cybersecurity issues.

  • Manage and develop the Network team to ensure the stability and secure operation of functions that support all business areas.

  • Responsible for monitoring, reporting, and remediating network systems to ensure the highest performance and availability.

  • Managing IT staff by recruiting and training employees, communicating job expectations, and monitoring performance.

  • Designs, establishes, and maintains a network infrastructure for local and wide area connectivity and remote access.

  • Monitoring daily operations, including server hardware, software, and operating systems.

  • Coordinating technology installations, upgrades, and maintenance.

  • Selecting and purchasing new and replacement hardware and software when necessary.

  • Testing, troubleshooting, and modifying information systems so that they operate effectively.

  • Generating performance reports for operating systems.

  • Evaluating technology risks to develop a network disaster recovery plan and backup procedures.

  • Remaining up to date with advances in technology and industry best practices.


Senior Information Technology Manager Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, software engineering, or a related field.

  • Required language(s): Bahasa Indonesia, English.

  • At least 5 Years of Working experience in the related field is required for this position.

  • Proven experience managing IT infrastructure and services.

  • Experience with computer networks, network administration, and network installation.

  • Experience with database administration, Mysql, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, and Amazon RDS.

  • Proficient in computer hardware, cabling installation and support, wireless technology applications and interfaces, and IT security.

  • Management and leadership skills.

  • Multi-tasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks.

  • Highly organized and detail-oriented.

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Flexible working hours.
title: Senior IT Manager

jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 (Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau terkait)

  • Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang IT (pengalaman Senior IT / IT Support Lead / IT Engineer menjadi nilai tambah)

  • Menguasai sistem operasi Windows Server & Linux

  • Menguasai networking (LAN, WAN, VPN, TCP/IP)

  • Memahami database management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)

  • Memahami konsep cyber security (firewall, backup, disaster recovery)

  • Familiar dengan ERP & business applications

  • Mampu melakukan scripting dasar (PowerShell, Bash, Python) menjadi nilai tambah

  • Terbiasa dan bersedia untuk melakukan perjalanan dinas

  • Mahir menggunakan aplikasi Microsoft Office, terutama Ms. Excel, Ms. Power Point, Ms. Word dan Ms. Teams

  • Diutamakan yang berdomisili di sekitar Jakarta Utara

  • Kemampuan analisis, problem solving yang kuat, koordinasi yang baik dengan user dan manajemen, dan kemampuan mentoring yang baik


Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  • Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengawasi infrastruktur IT perusahaan (hardware, software, network, dan security).

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis tingkat lanjut untuk permasalahan sistem dan jaringan.

  • Mengelola dan memelihara server, database, serta sistem aplikasi perusahaan.

  • Mengimplementasikan dan memastikan keamanan sistem IT (backup, firewall, antivirus, access control).

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor IT terkait pengadaan, maintenance, dan pengembangan sistem.

  • Mengembangkan, memelihara, dan mendokumentasikan SOP IT.

  • Melakukan monitoring performa sistem dan melakukan troubleshooting secara proaktif.

  • Mendukung implementasi dan pengembangan sistem ERP, aplikasi internal, dan integrasi sistem.

  • Membimbing dan melakukan knowledge sharing kepada junior IT/staff IT.

  • Menyusun laporan berkala terkait operasional dan pengembangan IT.

jobDescriptionHtml:
1. Melaksanakan instalasi, konfigurasi, dan pemeliharaan server fisik maupun virtual sesuai standar teknis.

  2. Mengelola dan memonitor sistem virtualisasi, storage, jaringan internal, serta perangkat infrastruktur pendukung lainnya.

  3. Menangani troubleshooting insiden infrastruktur dan berkoordinasi dengan vendor atau tim terkait untuk penyelesaiannya.

  4. Melakukan analisis kapasitas dan risiko serta memberikan rekomendasi pengembangan atau perbaikan infrastruktur.

  5. Menyusun dan memperbarui dokumentasi teknis, termasuk konfigurasi, arsitektur, dan catatan pemeliharaan.


Kualifikasi

● Pendidikan Minimal S1, Teknik Informatika/Teknik Komputer, IPK Minimal 3.00

  •  Menguasai sistem operasi (Linux dan/atau Windows) serta mampu melakukan administrasi, konfigurasi, dan troubleshooting server.

  • Memahami jaringan komputer termasuk Firewall/Switch, IP, DNS, dan VLAN serta mampu melakukan konfigurasi dan analisis permasalahan jaringan.

  • Memiliki pengalaman dalam pengelolaan virtualisasi (seperti VMware, Sangfor, atau sejenisnya).

  • Memiliki pengetahuan atau pengalaman terkait platform container (Docker, Kubernetes) menjadi nilai tambah.

  • Mampu membuat script (bash, Python, atau Perl) untuk pemeliharaan infrastruktur atau otomasi dengan konsep Infrastructure as Code.

  • Memiliki pengalaman administrasi database (MySQL, PostgreSQL, atau sejenisnya).

  • Memahami aspek keamanan sistem (antivirus, server hardening, akses kontrol, dan monitoring keamanan).

  • Memiliki pengalaman sebagai Infrastructure Jaringan  minimal 2 tahun

  • Dapat bekerja sesuai target dan deadline

  • Bersedia untuk penempatan di Alam Sutera, Tangerang

jobDescriptionHtml:
Job qualifications :

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field

  • At least >10 years of experience in IT Infrastructure, System Administration, or Technology Services, with >5 years in a managerial role.

  • Strong understanding of IT service management (ITSM), system integration, cloud services, and enterprise applications.

  • Proficient in both Indonesian and English (spoken and written)

  • Familiarity with cybersecurity, data protection, and disaster recovery planning

  • Having Experience manage product IBM will be advantages

  • Ability to manage IT service desk, incident management, and problem management.

  • Experience in vendor management, SLA monitoring, and budgeting for technology services.

  • Analytical thinking: sharp in identifying technical issues and finding effective solutions.

  • Leadership: capable of leading IT services teams and developing team competencies.

Job Responsibilites :

  • Oversee System Technology Services operations to ensure availability, reliability, minimize downtime system and security of company systems.

  • Develop strategies for improving technology services and driving continuous improvement.

  • Ensure achievement of SLA, operational KPIs, and regulatory compliance.

  • Build strong relationships with vendors, technology partners, and regulators.

·         Lead a big team
title: System Technology Services Manager

description: Job SummaryResponsible for the design, implementation, configuration and support of SAP PP & QM modules to meet business requirements in Japfa Group. The role needs to have understanding of the production concepts, manufacturing operations, quality management, along with deep expertise in ERP system...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Job Summary
Responsible for the design, implementation, configuration and support of SAP PP & QM modules to meet business requirements in Japfa Group. The role needs to have understanding of the production concepts, manufacturing operations, quality management, along with deep expertise in ERP systems, particularly SAP.


Responsibility

  • Understand and analyze business requirements related to production and quality management.

  • Translate business needs into SAP PP & QM modules implementation

  • Participate in SAP implementation projects, rollouts, upgrades, and ongoing support.

  • Support the integration between SAP and other system such as Manufacturing Execution System (MES), Shop floor, Advanced supply chain planning, etc.

  • Provide training and support to key users and end-users.

  • Troubleshoot and resolve system issues with minimal business disruption.

  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives within the PP and QM areas.


Requirements

  1. Education : Bachelor's degree (S1) in Informatics or other relevant fields.

  2. Work Experience

    • Minimum 2 years of experience in Production and Quality Management of ERP implementations, preferable in SAP PP/QM

    • Exposure to MES, Shop floor, or Advanced supply chain planning integration systems would be advantages.

  3. Skills

    • Technical skills:

      • Microsoft Office

      • SAP PP & QM

      • ABAP debugging (Optional)

      • SQL (Optional)

    • Soft Skills:

      • Strong Communication and Collaboration

      • Analytical and Problem - Solving

      • Interpersonal & Teamwork

      • Proactive & Initiative - Taking

      • Time Management & Prioritization

      • Continous Learning Attitude

  4. Language Skills: Fluent in English, both written and spoken.


Why Join us?

  • Work on challenging SAP projects and career advancement opportunities.

  • Join a professional and supportive team that values learning and knowledge-sharing.

  • The company values its people and fosters a culture of respect, recognition, and continuous development.

Job Description

a. Model Development and Deployment
- Design, build, and deploy machine learning models for credit scoring. Perform risk evaluation and business impact analysis and making suggestion to Risk counterparts.
- Develop and perform testing on model implementation logics.

b. Feature Engineering and Model Improvement

c. Data Analysis and Insights
Work along with Risk counterparts to analysis portfolio and acquisition performance. Fine tuning Risk rule engines and drive improvement to implementation.

  • Min. 5 years experience as Data Science/Data Scientist. Involve within the fintech or finance services industry and have an understanding of risk management would be an advantage
  • Deep understanding in machine learning is a must
  • Strong analytical thinking
  • Proven experience in developing and deploying machine learning models in a production environment

This role plays a key part in developing new products and improving existing ones through scientific research and collaboration.Qualifications:Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Biotechno...
jobDescriptionHtml:
KalGen DNA is seeking a passionate and detail-oriented Research and Development Officer to join our innovative team. This role plays a key part in developing new products and improving existing ones through scientific research and collaboration.

Qualifications:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Pharmacy, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, or related Life Sciences (Master’s degree preferred).

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in a related research field.

  • Proficient in the use of PCR equipment and micropipetting techniques.

  • Having working experience in R&D is preferable.

  • Strong skills in planning, adaptability, SOP compliance, and performance monitoring.

  • Proficient in spoken and written English.


Job Description:

  • Conduct R&D activities based on scientific principles to develop or enhance products.

  • Assist in estimating costs, resources, and timelines for research projects, and monitor progress to ensure targets are met.

  • Collaborate with researchers, inventors, and research institutions to maintain and expand technical expertise.

  • Lead technology and process transfers from other manufacturers or companies.

  • Coordinate the diversification of raw materials, packaging, and new technologies for implementation in manufacturing processes.

  • Work with the QA department to carry out quality risk assessments for products and processes.

  • Prepare and review technical documentation such as the Design History File (DHF), Device Master Record (DMR), and Device History Record (DHR).

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams including QA, QC, and Production.

description: CAREER OPPORTUNITYCygnet Pericon was founded in 2000 as a privately-owned company dedicated to providing enterprise application,implementation, and support services. Since then, we have expanded our services to include informationmanagement, financial services and regulatory compliance solution deve...
jobDescriptionHtml:
CAREER OPPORTUNITY

Cygnet Pericon was founded in 2000 as a privately-owned company dedicated to providing enterprise application,

implementation, and support services. Since then, we have expanded our services to include information

management, financial services and regulatory compliance solution development and implementation. Today,

Cygnet Pericon has broadened and organized its expertise to provide one source stop for organization’s information

management needs: consulting and software.

For our Jakarta office, we are looking for a:


Junior Consultant

POSITION DESCRIPTION

An entry / junior level position for analysis, design, development, and implementation of Regulatory

Reporting/Financial Reporting.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Liaise with data source expert(s) to understand the underlying database for extraction purposes, liaise

  • With Business Analyst(s) to design jobs, work flows and data flows to perform transformation required to populate the target database.

  • Conduct development and unit testing of the developed report to ensure system correctness,

  • Completeness, and high-performance execution.

  • Ensure proper documentation for each developed report.

QUALIFICATIONS

Education:

A degree holder in Computer Science or Information System or associate degree (D3) with proven skills in SQL

Specific Requirements:

  • Experience in SQL (DDL, DML) is desirable.

  • Familiar with at least one programming language.

  • Excellence in oral/written communications in English, interpersonal relations, and team cooperation.

  • Self-starter with the ability to work independently.

  • Able to adopt a structured approach to projects and the ability to set priorities.

  • Strong willingness to learn new things related to IT in general and Reporting in particular.

  • WE OFFER


In addition to a casual yet dynamic work atmosphere, we offer competitive compensation and benefits and the

possibility to participate in international projects in Asia.

description: QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCES & ATTRIBUTESMinimum a bachelor's degree holder in Computer Science.Strong organizational skillsDemonstrated ability to communicate effectively in English and Indonesian, both speaking and writing.Ability to work collaboratively with members of the Information Services Dep...
jobDescriptionHtml:
QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCES & ATTRIBUTES

  • Minimum a bachelor's degree holder in Computer Science.

  • Strong organizational skills

  • Demonstrated ability to communicate effectively in English and Indonesian, both speaking and writing.

  • Ability to work collaboratively with members of the Information Services Department

  • Excellent problem-solving skills

  • Strong technical skills with a wide range of hardware and software in a cross-platform environment. Having a Mac OS and IOS platform background is preferred.

  • Customer-service approach to working with end-users

  • Clear commitment to Child Protection, safety, service learning, and environmental stewardship


DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES 

Technical Support & Issue Resolution

  • Provide efficient and timely support to end-users, ensuring all technical issues are resolved effectively and escalating cases when necessary.

  • Address user inquiries regarding software and hardware operations, offering clear and accurate guidance to resolve issues.

  • Assess and verify system functionality by conducting observations and tests to identify and troubleshoot errors.

  • Collaborate with IT staff and engineers to manage the distribution, updates, and patches of hardware and software systems.

  • Partner with vendor-provided technical support teams to deliver exceptional customer service to end-users.


Help Desk Management & Documentation

  • Proactively monitor and contribute to the Help Desk Ticket Management System, ensuring all issues are accurately logged, tracked, and resolved.

  • Maintain thorough documentation of daily activities, including technical problems, corrective actions, and installation procedures.

  • Develop, update, and effectively communicate standard procedures for common technical support tasks to enhance consistency and efficiency.

  • Contribute to the Information Services Knowledge Base by ensuring comprehensive and up-to-date documentation of service-level agreements (SLAs) and problem-solving solutions.


Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

  • Collaborate with the Technical Services and Multimedia Coordinator and the rest of the IT team to establish, refine, and communicate Service Level Agreements (SLAs).

  • Work closely with IT staff to resolve complex technical issues, providing guidance and support as needed.

  • Innovate and implement strategies to enhance problem resolution processes, continuously improving help desk efficiency and effectiveness.

  • Recommend and develop improvements to help desk operations, including creating checklists, refining procedures, enhancing policies, conducting training, and strengthening security protocols.


Service Orientation

  • Foster a service-oriented and data-driven culture within the IT Department, ensuring high standards of customer satisfaction.


Ongoing Professional Growth

  • Reflect upon professional practice and engage in learning opportunities.

  • Set goals for professional development and take advantage of professional development opportunities.


Other

  • Embrace the JIS Learning Dispositions of Resilience, Resourcefulness, Relating, and Reflectiveness

  • Performing other related duties and assuming other responsibilities as assigned by the Head of IT and Technical Support and Multimedia Coordinator.
title: Technical Support Specialist

description: QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCES & ATTRIBUTESMinimum a bachelor's degree holder in Computer Science.Strong organizational skillsDemonstrated ability to communicate effectively in English and Indonesian, both speaking and writing.Ability to work collaboratively with members of the Information Services Dep...
jobDescriptionHtml:
QUALIFICATIONS, EXPERIENCES & ATTRIBUTES

  • Minimum a bachelor's degree holder in Computer Science.

  • Strong organizational skills

  • Demonstrated ability to communicate effectively in English and Indonesian, both speaking and writing.

  • Ability to work collaboratively with members of the Information Services Department

  • Excellent problem-solving skills

  • Strong technical skills with a wide range of hardware and software in a cross-platform environment. Having a Mac OS and IOS platform background is preferred.

  • Customer-service approach to working with end-users

  • Clear commitment to Child Protection, safety, service learning, and environmental stewardship


DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES 

Technical Support & Issue Resolution

  • Provide efficient and timely support to end-users, ensuring all technical issues are resolved effectively and escalating cases when necessary.

  • Address user inquiries regarding software and hardware operations, offering clear and accurate guidance to resolve issues.

  • Assess and verify system functionality by conducting observations and tests to identify and troubleshoot errors.

  • Collaborate with IT staff and engineers to manage the distribution, updates, and patches of hardware and software systems.

  • Partner with vendor-provided technical support teams to deliver exceptional customer service to end-users.


Help Desk Management & Documentation

  • Proactively monitor and contribute to the Help Desk Ticket Management System, ensuring all issues are accurately logged, tracked, and resolved.

  • Maintain thorough documentation of daily activities, including technical problems, corrective actions, and installation procedures.

  • Develop, update, and effectively communicate standard procedures for common technical support tasks to enhance consistency and efficiency.

  • Contribute to the Information Services Knowledge Base by ensuring comprehensive and up-to-date documentation of service-level agreements (SLAs) and problem-solving solutions.


Collaboration & Continuous Improvement

  • Collaborate with the Technical Services and Multimedia Coordinator and the rest of the IT team to establish, refine, and communicate Service Level Agreements (SLAs).

  • Work closely with IT staff to resolve complex technical issues, providing guidance and support as needed.

  • Innovate and implement strategies to enhance problem resolution processes, continuously improving help desk efficiency and effectiveness.

  • Recommend and develop improvements to help desk operations, including creating checklists, refining procedures, enhancing policies, conducting training, and strengthening security protocols.


Service Orientation

  • Foster a service-oriented and data-driven culture within the IT Department, ensuring high standards of customer satisfaction.


Ongoing Professional Growth

  • Reflect upon professional practice and engage in learning opportunities.

  • Set goals for professional development and take advantage of professional development opportunities.


Other

  • Embrace the JIS Learning Dispositions of Resilience, Resourcefulness, Relating, and Reflectiveness

  • Performing other related duties and assuming other responsibilities as assigned by the Head of IT and Technical Support and Multimedia Coordinator.
title: Technical Support Specialist

description: JOB DESCRIPTIONS:Requirements Gathering & AnalysisAnalyze current systems and processes to identify improvement opportunities.Translate business needs into functional and technical specifications.System Design & DocumentationDesign system workflows, data models, wireframes, and functional architectu...
jobDescriptionHtml:
JOB DESCRIPTIONS:

Requirements Gathering & Analysis

  • Analyze current systems and processes to identify improvement opportunities.

  • Translate business needs into functional and technical specifications.

System Design & Documentation

  • Design system workflows, data models, wireframes, and functional architecture.

  • Prepare detailed documentation including Functional Specification Documents (FSD), Use Case Diagrams, Data Flow Diagrams, and System Mapping.

Coordination with Developers

  • Work closely with software engineers during system development.

  • Ensure that solutions developed align with specifications and business needs.

User Acceptance Testing (UAT) & Deployment

  • Assist users during UAT by preparing test scripts and validating test results.

  • Coordinate with infrastructure teams during system deployment.

Change & Issue Management

  • Evaluate change requests and assess the impact on existing systems.

  • Analyze and troubleshoot user-reported issues, providing detailed root cause analysis and solution proposals.


QUALIFICATIONS:

  1. Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related fields.

  2. Minimum 2–5 years of experience as a System Analyst or in a similar role.

  3. Strong knowledge of system development life cycle (SDLC), especially in Agile or Waterfall environments.

  4. Proficiency in tools such as Microsoft Visio, Draw.io, Figma, SQL, and issue-tracking tools (e.g., JIRA).

description: JobdeskCI/CD Pipeline: Merancang arsitektur end-to-end, standarisasi pipeline, dan mengelola otomasi deployment untuk berbagai lingkungan.Manajemen Rilis: Melakukan deployment harian ke lingkungan internal dan klien, serta menjaga konsistensi strategi rilis dan rollback.Desain Arsitektur: Berkolabor...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Jobdesk

  • CI/CD Pipeline: Merancang arsitektur end-to-end, standarisasi pipeline, dan mengelola otomasi deployment untuk berbagai lingkungan.

  • Manajemen Rilis: Melakukan deployment harian ke lingkungan internal dan klien, serta menjaga konsistensi strategi rilis dan rollback.

  • Desain Arsitektur: Berkolaborasi dengan developer dalam desain sistem microservices, strategi deployment, serta meninjau sisi skalabilitas dan reliabilitas.

  • Manajemen Insiden: Menangani troubleshooting lintas layer (aplikasi, infra, jaringan), koordinasi saat insiden, dan melakukan analisis pasca-insiden.

  • Peningkatan Operasional: Mengidentifikasi risiko operasional dan terus meningkatkan aspek otomasi dan monitoring.

Kualifikasi (Must-Have Skills)

  • Pengalaman: Minimal > 10 tahun di bidang terkait.

  • Orchestration & Containerization: Ahli dalam Kubernetes (GKE, EKS, on-prem), Docker, Helm, Kustomize, dan manajemen container registry.

  • Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Pengalaman mendalam dengan Terraform (modular design) dan Ansible untuk konfigurasi VM/bare metal.

  • Cloud & Networking: Penguasaan AWS dan GCP, desain VPC, subnetting, VPN, Load Balancing (L4/L7), serta manajemen SSL/TLS.

  • CI/CD Tools: Berpengalaman menggunakan Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, dan GitOps (ArgoCD/Flux CD).

  • Observability: Terampil mengelola Monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana), Logging (Elastic Stack, Loki), dan Tracing (Jaeger, OpenTelemetry).

  • Programming: Mahir dalam Bash/Shell script, Golang, dan Python.

  • Keamanan: Memahami pengerasan keamanan Kubernetes, RBAC, IAM least-privilege, dan manajemen rahasia (secrets management).

Nilai Plus (Nice-to-Have)

  • Memiliki sertifikasi: AWS Solution Architect/DevOps, GCP Professional, atau CNCF (CKA/CKAD).

  • Pengalaman dengan Message Broker seperti Kafka, RabbitMQ, atau Redis Stream.

  • Memahami konsep Hexagonal/Clean Architecture dan database terdistribusi.
title: Senior Infrastructure/Devops Engineer

description: Kualifikasi:Pendidikan minimal S1 (Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau terkait)Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang IT (pengalaman Senior IT / IT Support Lead / IT Engineer menjadi nilai tambah)Menguasai sistem operasi Windows Server & LinuxMenguasai networking (LAN, WAN, VPN...
jobDescriptionHtml:
Kualifikasi:

  • Pendidikan minimal S1 (Teknik Informatika, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Komputer, atau terkait)

  • Pengalaman minimal 5 tahun di bidang IT (pengalaman Senior IT / IT Support Lead / IT Engineer menjadi nilai tambah)

  • Menguasai sistem operasi Windows Server & Linux

  • Menguasai networking (LAN, WAN, VPN, TCP/IP)

  • Memahami database management (MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server)

  • Memahami konsep cyber security (firewall, backup, disaster recovery)

  • Familiar dengan ERP & business applications

  • Mampu melakukan scripting dasar (PowerShell, Bash, Python) menjadi nilai tambah

  • Terbiasa dan bersedia untuk melakukan perjalanan dinas

  • Mahir menggunakan aplikasi Microsoft Office, terutama Ms. Excel, Ms. Power Point, Ms. Word dan Ms. Teams

  • Diutamakan yang berdomisili di sekitar Jakarta Utara

  • Kemampuan analisis, problem solving yang kuat, koordinasi yang baik dengan user dan manajemen, dan kemampuan mentoring yang baik


Tanggung Jawab Utama:

  • Merencanakan, mengelola, dan mengawasi infrastruktur IT perusahaan (hardware, software, network, dan security).

  • Memberikan dukungan teknis tingkat lanjut untuk permasalahan sistem dan jaringan.

  • Mengelola dan memelihara server, database, serta sistem aplikasi perusahaan.

  • Mengimplementasikan dan memastikan keamanan sistem IT (backup, firewall, antivirus, access control).

  • Berkoordinasi dengan vendor IT terkait pengadaan, maintenance, dan pengembangan sistem.

  • Mengembangkan, memelihara, dan mendokumentasikan SOP IT.

  • Melakukan monitoring performa sistem dan melakukan troubleshooting secara proaktif.

  • Mendukung implementasi dan pengembangan sistem ERP, aplikasi internal, dan integrasi sistem.

  • Membimbing dan melakukan knowledge sharing kepada junior IT/staff IT.

  • Menyusun laporan berkala terkait operasional dan pengembangan IT.

jobDescriptionHtml:
Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

  • Must hold CCNA/CCNP, CompTIA Network+, or equivalent.

  • Minimum 3 years in network engineering.

  • Strong proficiency in configuration and troubleshooting (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN, VPN), routing protocols (OSPF, EIGRP), VoIP, and QoS.

  • Familiarity with firewalls and security appliances, as well as network monitoring tools (e.g., Nagios, SolarWinds).

  • Knowledge of SD-WAN, network automation tools, and experience with cloud networking (AWS, Azure).

  • Proven ability in problem-solving, documentation, and communication.

Responsibilities:

  • Design and deploy LAN/WAN, Wi-Fi, and VPN solutions.

  • Configure and maintain network devices (routers, switches, firewalls).

  • Monitor network performance and troubleshoot issues.

  • Implement network security measures and compliance standards.

  • Support disaster recovery and redundancy planning.

  • Collaborate with IT teams for infrastructure upgrades and migrations.
title: IT Infrastructure & Networking System Engineer

description: The Senior IT Manager is responsible for supporting all functions related to Information Technology. This includes leading and managing the implementation of all IT initiatives to support the department's needs, including but not limited to Systems, Network management and security, Servers, and Infr...
jobDescriptionHtml:
The Senior IT Manager is responsible for supporting all functions related to Information Technology. This includes leading and managing the implementation of all IT initiatives to support the department's needs, including but not limited to Systems, Network management and security, Servers, and Infrastructure, maintaining and updating IT policies and procedures, creating IT training and working with the training staff, Risk Management, Incident Response/Recovery, and Compliance.


Senior Information Technology Manager Responsibilities:

  • Oversees IT security to prevent and respond to potential breaches or cybersecurity issues.

  • Manage and develop the Network team to ensure the stability and secure operation of functions that support all business areas.

  • Responsible for monitoring, reporting, and remediating network systems to ensure the highest performance and availability.

  • Managing IT staff by recruiting and training employees, communicating job expectations, and monitoring performance.

  • Designs, establishes, and maintains a network infrastructure for local and wide area connectivity and remote access.

  • Monitoring daily operations, including server hardware, software, and operating systems.

  • Coordinating technology installations, upgrades, and maintenance.

  • Selecting and purchasing new and replacement hardware and software when necessary.

  • Testing, troubleshooting, and modifying information systems so that they operate effectively.

  • Generating performance reports for operating systems.

  • Evaluating technology risks to develop a network disaster recovery plan and backup procedures.

  • Remaining up to date with advances in technology and industry best practices.


Senior Information Technology Manager Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in information technology, computer science, software engineering, or a related field.

  • Required language(s): Bahasa Indonesia, English.

  • At least 5 Years of Working experience in the related field is required for this position.

  • Proven experience managing IT infrastructure and services.

  • Experience with computer networks, network administration, and network installation.

  • Experience with database administration, Mysql, MSSQL, PostgreSQL, and Amazon RDS.

  • Proficient in computer hardware, cabling installation and support, wireless technology applications and interfaces, and IT security.

  • Management and leadership skills.

  • Multi-tasking and time-management skills, with the ability to prioritize tasks.

  • Highly organized and detail-oriented.

  • Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

  • Flexible working hours.
title: Senior IT Manager

jobDescriptionHtml:
Responsibility:

  • Data Gathering & Labeling: Improve AI by collecting and labeling gameplay data, identifying key moments, and ensuring accurate highlight detection.

  • Product Testing: Test Eklipse.gg across games, platforms, and devices to identify bugs and improve AI-driven highlights.

  • AI Performance Evaluation: Analyze AI-generated highlights for accuracy and relevance, and provide feedback for improvement.

  • Prompt Engineering: Optimize AI prompts for creating high-quality content tailored to platforms like TikTok and YouTube.

  • Collaboration: Work with other teams (Data, Marketing, AI) on data tasks, testing, and platform optimization.

  • Automation: Streamline processes by automating data handling, testing, and maintenance tasks.


Qualifications: 

  • Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Informatics, Math, Statistics and related field.

  • Proficiency in English is a must, as this role requires collaboration with a global team.

  • Fresh Graduates or 1 year experience are welcome.

  • Passionate about gaming, streaming, and online content creation.

  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. 

  • Detail-oriented and highly organized.

  • Basic understanding of data analysis and manipulation.

  • Basic programming/scripting skills (Python or similar preferred) for automation tasks are a plus.

  • Familiarity with AI concepts and machine learning is highly advantageous.

  • Excellent communication and teamwork skills.

  • Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.
title: AI & Data Optimization
